name: forever-ai-components
description: A zero-dependency library of animated web components: 602 single-file tiles across 57 themes plus 20 captioned galleries, all surfaced on an infinite scrolling 'Forever' canvas.

totals.note: Public component count = 'tiles'/'standaloneComponents'. 'galleryDemos' are embedded inside gallery pages and are not standalone; 'all' sums both and must not be advertised as the component count.

conventions.self_contained: Every component is a single .html file: inline <style>+<script>, no frameworks, no external libs (Google Fonts allowed). Opens by double-click, works offline.
conventions.tiles: infinite/<theme-slug>/NN-<kebab>.html — one component per file, html/body margin:0 height:100% overflow:hidden, fills its frame 180-640px, has a corner caption, pauses on document.hidden, honors prefers-reduced-motion.
conventions.galleries: <slug>/index.html — a showcase page with a responsive grid of ~8-10 live demos, each captioned with its technique.
conventions.forever_canvas: infinite/index.html renders infinite/manifest.js as an endlessly pannable/zoomable grid; tiles lazy-mount as <iframe>s near the viewport (≤22 live).

componentSchema._comment: Enriched per-tile metadata schema. All fields are optional — the manifest builder only reads file/title/bg/accent. New fields are agent-facing and power filter/search/curation.
componentSchema.tags: string[] — semantic search/filter keywords (technique, shape, mood, subject)
componentSchema.description: string — one-sentence visual description; what you see, not what it means
componentSchema.useWhen: string — contexts / design situations where this tile fits
componentSchema.avoidWhen: string — contexts where this tile breaks or looks wrong
componentSchema.agentPrompt: string — ready-to-use AI edit instruction referencing actual class names / values
componentSchema.editableAreas: string[] — CSS/JS knobs safe to change; name the var or selector
componentSchema.preserveElements: string[] — things that must not be removed or renamed; include the why
componentSchema.knownLimitations: string[] — bugs, constraints, or brittleness the editor should know

galleries.title: Infinitude
galleries.theme: polka repetition, mirrored infinity (anonymous style study)

items.title: Weight Morph Wave
items.description: Each letter of a word pulses font-weight and vertical scale in a staggered sine wave, shifting hue from cyan to blue.
items.useWhen: Hero text needing ambient motion without distraction. Brand name displays.
items.avoidWhen: Body copy, strings longer than 8 characters, or viewports under 280px.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to 'HELLO', set accent to #FF6B6B, slow the wave cycle to 4 seconds.
knownLimitations: Requires system font with bold weight; no variable-font axis — weight snaps in steps

items.title: Scramble Decode
items.description: Neon-green monospace words scramble through random glyphs then lock left-to-right like a terminal decrypting. Auto-cycles; click skips to next word.
items.useWhen: Hacker/terminal aesthetic hero sections, loading screens, cyberpunk or tech-brand reveals needing text drama.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded near-black). Long words lose legibility during scramble phase.
items.agentPrompt: Change the words array to ["SYSTEM","BREACH","OVERRIDE"], set neon color to #00eaff, and slow reveal by changing the per-letter step from 5 to 9.
editableAreas: neon color (#39ff14 in CSS and text-shadow)
settle delay before next word (+70 frames)
preserveElements: span node pool reuse (avoids innerHTML churn)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit to change from near-black
Click div lacks aria role for keyboard accessibility
Auto-cycles by default — remove word-advance block for single static decode

items.title: Split-Flap Board
items.description: Six amber tiles cycle through letters to spell airport-style words (DEPART, ARRIVE, ONTIME, BOARDS) on a dark charcoal background with a rotateX flip animation.
items.useWhen: Hero sections with a travel, transit, or retro-tech theme. Countdown or status displays that need tactile mechanical character.
items.avoidWhen: Long words or sentences — board is fixed at 6 characters. Light-background layouts where the hardcoded dark charcoal body conflicts.
items.agentPrompt: Change seq to ["HELLO","WORLD","READY","GOXYZ"] and set the amber color from #f4c430 to electric blue #00bfff to give it a sci-fi feel.
knownLimitations: Words longer than 6 characters are silently truncated — change N to match the longest word
Flip advances through full alphabet sequentially, so letters far apart take longer to settle

items.title: Gradient Shimmer
items.description: Bold "SHIMMER" text with a rainbow gradient clipped to the letterforms, continuously panning for a glossy iridescent sweep on deep purple.
items.useWhen: Brand name displays, hero headlines, dark-mode splash screens needing vibrant ambient motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark purple body), body copy, or contexts where rainbow hues clash with brand palette.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to 'GLOW', shift the gradient palette to warm sunset tones (#ff6b35, #f7c59f, #fffae3), and slow the cycle to 10s.
knownLimitations: background-clip:text requires -webkit- prefix for full Safari support
Background color is hardcoded dark purple — must edit CSS to use on light backgrounds
Single static word only; multiline layouts need line-height adjustment

items.title: Glitch RGB Split
items.description: Red and cyan pseudo-element copies of GLITCH drift and randomly snap with clipped displacement, simulating a CRT RGB-split glitch on near-black.
items.useWhen: Dark hero sections, cyberpunk or tech aesthetics, error/system-failure themed UIs, demo reels.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded #080808), readable body text contexts, or reduced-motion environments where the effect is fully suppressed.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to 'ERROR', set red channel to #ff6600 and cyan to #00ffcc, increase burst probability from 0.06 to 0.12 for more frequent glitch spikes.
preserveElements: CSS custom properties feeding pseudo-element transforms
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS (#080808) and pseudo-element background — must change in two places
Both channels share the same --clip value so they clip identically during bursts

items.title: Marquee Ticker
items.description: Two rows of bold words scroll in opposite directions — yellow left, teal right — with red bullet separators on a dark green background, news-ticker style.
items.useWhen: Brand marquees, event countdowns, portfolio hero sections, or any looping announcement banner needing kinetic energy.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts where users need to read the text carefully — fast scroll speed and opposing directions make sustained reading difficult.
items.agentPrompt: Change row 1 words to ["DESIGN","BUILD","SHIP","ITERATE","LAUNCH"], set yellow to #FF6B6B, and slow row 1 scroll to 20s by editing the .a animation duration.
preserveElements: duplicate unit in fill() for seamless 50% loop
knownLimitations: Seamless loop relies on exact 50% translateX — adding/removing words without duplicating the unit will break the loop
No click or hover interactivity; speed cannot be changed at runtime without JS

items.title: Moving Mask
items.description: Diagonal gradient light band sweeps across REVEAL, illuminating letters in shifting pink-blue-cyan hues against dark. Pure CSS mask + background-clip animation.
items.useWhen: Hero reveals, splash screens, brand name intros needing a premium lighting-sweep effect on dark backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark body), strings longer than ~8 chars, or contexts requiring broad CSS mask-image browser support.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to 'LAUNCH', slow the sweep to 6s, and shift palette to gold: set background to linear-gradient(90deg,#ffb347,#ff6b6b,#ffd700,#ffb347).
preserveElements: dual-layer stacking (#base dim underlay + #lit masked overlay)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to #0b0b14 — edit CSS body to change theme
Text must be duplicated in two divs due to background-clip:text technique
-webkit-text-fill-color overrides color on #lit; edit background gradient to recolor

items.title: Wavy Sine
items.description: Letters of "WAVES~" bob vertically and rotate along a staggered sine wave with per-letter hue cycling between cyan and teal on a deep navy background.
items.useWhen: Hero or ambient display for ocean, wave, or fluid-themed brands. Looping title cards or screensaver-style backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Long strings — effect only works well for 6–8 characters. Light backgrounds require CSS edits throughout.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to "FLUID~", increase vertical amplitude from 26 to 40, and shift the hue base from 160 to 200 for a bluer palette.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — light-theme use requires editing both body background and span color
No aria role on the animated container — purely decorative
clamp font-size may clip very long words on narrow viewports

items.title: 3D Extruded Word
items.description: Bold word "DEPTH" rotates in 3D via oscillating rotateX/Y transforms; 14-layer drop-shadow stack creates a warm extruded block illusion.
items.useWhen: Hero displays, title cards, or any brand word that benefits from tactile 3D depth without 3D-library overhead.
items.avoidWhen: Strings longer than 6–7 characters (shadow stack becomes visually noisy) or low-contrast light backgrounds.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to 'BOLD', set color to #00eaff, increase extrusion depth to 20 layers (d<=20), and slow the rotation by setting t+=0.01.
knownLimitations: Text shadow extrusion is purely 2D layered — true depth breaks if the word is rotated beyond ~45deg
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#1a1030); must edit to use on light backgrounds

items.title: Typewriter Loop
items.description: Monospace terminal line types and deletes phrases in a loop with randomized keystroke timing; a glowing green block caret blinks throughout.
items.useWhen: Developer-oriented hero text, CLI-themed landing pages, or any dark-background context needing ambient motion with a coding aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded near-black). Contexts where rapid text cycling distracts from primary content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the phrases array to ["build.", "ship.", "iterate.", "deploy();"], set caret color to #60a5fa, and slow typing speed to 130+Math.random()*80.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded near-black in CSS — must edit to use on light backgrounds
No ARIA live region — screen readers won't announce changing text

items.title: Stagger Cascade
items.description: Amber glyphs drop one by one with motion trails and spring squash on impact; settled word breathes with a sine lift, then cycles to the next word.
items.useWhen: Hero word reveals, loading sequences, kinetic typography demos on dark backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark navy). Long words — layout is centered and uses fixed font size relative to viewport.
items.agentPrompt: Change WORDS array to ["HELLO","WORLD","CRAFT"], set ACC to '#00eaff', and increase drop distance by changing drop=fs*2.2.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded #0d0b1a — must edit CSS and staticFrame fill to change
Click skips to next word mid-animation with no transition guard
pointermove nudge is subtle — nearly imperceptible on desktop

items.title: Rack Focus
items.description: Two stacked words trade sharpness in a cinematic rack-focus breath: the defocused word blooms into a soft cyan halo while the focused one snaps razor-sharp.
items.useWhen: Hero sections, loading screens, or film/photography brand contexts needing cinematic ambient motion with minimal distraction.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts where users need to read both words simultaneously, or on low-end devices sensitive to repeated CSS filter repaints.
items.agentPrompt: Change the two words to 'FOCUS' and 'SHIFT', slow the breath cycle to 8000ms by setting PERIOD=8000, and change the bloom halo color from #56cfe1 to #ff6b6b.
editableAreas: word content (data-w attribute and text node)
preserveElements: quantized blur step logic (0.5px rounding for perf)
knownLimitations: CSS filter:blur() triggers repaint every frame — quantized to 0.5px steps to reduce cost but still heavier than transform-only animations
Pointer nudge shifts phase timing, which can cause a subtle jump on fast cursor sweeps
Background color hardcoded to #101418 in CSS — must edit to change dark scheme

items.title: Kerning Breath
items.description: The word BREATHE expands and contracts letter-spacing in a slow 5.2-second breath cycle; hairline glows pulse in each gap, rippling outward from center.
items.useWhen: Meditation, wellness, or calm-brand hero sections. Ambient idle screens where slow organic motion sets tone.
items.avoidWhen: High-information layouts where subtle glow competes with content. Contexts needing static, legible display text.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to 'INHALE', slow the breath to 8 seconds (period=8), and shift the glow color from #ff7b9c to #7bc8ff.
preserveElements: phase offset array for center-out ripple
knownLimitations: Pointer nudge (push) adds abrupt gap expansion that may feel jarring in calm contexts
Font weight 200 requires a system font with thin weight — may render heavier on some Android devices

items.title: Ransom Assembly
items.description: Mixed-font letters on cut-paper swatches fly in from random edges and spring-tumble into RANSOM, then reassemble. Click to restart.
items.useWhen: Dark hero sections needing dramatic kinetic type. Title screens, creative portfolio intros, or thriller-themed UIs.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring readable static text at all times — letters are off-screen between cycles. Low-end mobile may stutter.
items.agentPrompt: Change WORD to 'HELLO', swap ACC to '#f4a261', and increase spring stiffness from 0.10 to 0.18 so letters snap into place faster.
preserveElements: glyphW cache (measureText called once in layout, not per frame)
knownLimitations: WORD is hardcoded to 6 chars — fams/wts/caseFlip/wsc arrays must be extended to match if word length changes
Background color hardcoded in both BG constant and CSS — two places to update
Pointer nudge only works on unsettled glyphs

items.title: Ticker Tape Fall
items.description: Split-flap letter reels spin and brake staggered onto each letter with motion-blur streaks and a teal glow flash on lock. Auto-cycles four words.
items.useWhen: Dark-theme hero displays, departure/arrival board aesthetics, retro terminal branding, looping word reveals.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark canvas). Words longer than ~8 chars may overflow on narrow viewports.
items.agentPrompt: Change the WORDS array to ["LAUNCH","DEPLOY","SHIP","BUILD"] and set accent to #a855f7 (update fillStyle '#2ec4b6' and all shadowColor rgba values).
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to #07120f — must change CSS and canvas fillRect to use a different background
pointermove accelerates spinning reels but has no touch equivalent beyond click
Very long words shrink glyphs significantly on short viewports

items.title: Line Wipe Sweep
items.description: A gold scan bar sweeps down outlined letters, filling them with glowing solid color as it passes — like a darkroom print developing. Cycles through four words.
items.useWhen: Hero text reveals, loading screens, or brand moments where a dramatic develop/reveal effect fits. Dark backgrounds only.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (BG is hardcoded dark maroon). Contexts where auto-cycling word changes would distract from surrounding content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the words array to ["LAUNCH","BUILD","SHIP","GROW"], set ACC to '#00eaff' for a cyan glow, and slow the sweep speed by changing 0.012 to 0.007.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and JS — must change both BG constant and CSS to recolor
Pointer nudge only accelerates sweep, not a full pointer interaction
No aria labels on canvas or click target

items.title: Optical Axis Morph
items.description: The word MORPH breathes between narrow-upright and wide-italic states via canvas-drawn stroke segments; violet-to-magenta glow pulses with each axis cycle.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero sections, loading screens, or brand moments where typographic motion signals transformation.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Contexts needing selectable or screen-reader-accessible text.
items.agentPrompt: Change the word to 'SHIFT', set the accent base color to electric blue (replace 150+hot*49, 80+hot*45, 255 with 0, 200+hot*55, 255), and slow the cycle to t += 0.007.
knownLimitations: Letters are custom segment lists — only M, O, R, P, H are defined; adding new letters requires authoring segment arrays
Text is canvas-drawn so not selectable or accessible to screen readers
Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas clear — must change both to retheme

items.title: Baseline Bounce
items.description: Amber monospace letters bounce off a baseline in a staggered ripple with squash-stretch and shadow puddles. Pointer kicks letters up; click launches all.
items.useWhen: Hero or loading screen needing playful, high-energy kinetic type. Brand name displays with a bouncy, game-like personality.
items.avoidWhen: Words longer than 8 characters (letters crowd). Contexts where constant motion competes with readable content.
items.agentPrompt: Change WORD to 'HELLO', set ACC to '#00eaff', and slow the ripple by changing LAG from 0.13 to 0.22.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in BG constant — must edit both CSS and JS to change
pointermove kicks only the nearest letter; no multi-touch support

items.title: Vapor Condense
items.description: 300 teal particles drift as a glowing haze then gradually condense into the crisp word VAPOR via cosine easing, then dissolve back — looping continuously.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero sections, loading screens, or ambient brand reveals where a word needs to emerge from atmospheric noise.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark canvas). Contexts requiring fast legibility — the condense phase takes half the cycle.
items.agentPrompt: Change WORD to "DREAM", increase N to 450, and shift the teal palette by setting r/g/b base to rgba(120,80,220) in the color calculation.
editableAreas: color teal base (r/g/b formula in frame loop)
preserveElements: offscreen canvas pixel-sampling for anchor points
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to near-black #0b0f0e — must edit CSS to change
Click resets cycle to t=0 but pointermove nudge effect is very subtle
No aria label on canvas — purely decorative

items.title: Pivot Flip Row
items.description: A row of split-flap cards flips letter by letter in a cascading wave, cycling through words in mint-on-purple departure-board style.
items.useWhen: Airport/transit-themed UIs, countdown displays, hero text with a mechanical retro feel.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible static text at all times; low-end devices where canvas redraws per frame may stutter.
items.agentPrompt: Change the words array to ["CODE","SHIP","DONE"], set ACC to '#ffdb80' for an amber palette, and increase STEP to 120 for a slower cascade.
editableAreas: hold time between words (650ms in frame loop)
knownLimitations: All words should be similar length to avoid layout reflow mid-cycle; maxLen logic handles it but short words leave visible empty card slots
Click only restarts the cycle (resets t0), it does not advance to next word on demand

items.title: Bar Grow + Reshuffle
items.description: Seven rounded gradient bars ease to new random heights every 1.6s with glowing cap dots. Click triggers an immediate reshuffle.
items.useWhen: Dashboard hero widgets, loading states, or anywhere a live metric feel is needed without real data.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring real data binding or axis labels — bars are decorative with no data semantics or accessible labels.
items.agentPrompt: Change bar count to 10, update pal array with blues/purples, slow reshuffle interval from 1600 to 2500ms.
knownLimitations: No axis labels or values — purely decorative, not accessible as a real chart
Background hardcoded to #0e1726 in CSS

items.title: Live Line Sweep
items.description: A glowing cyan area line chart scrolls a live sine-plus-noise time-series across a faint grid, with a white head dot marking the latest value.
items.useWhen: Dashboard hero sections, live-data widgets, terminal-style monitoring UI backgrounds, or any dark-theme data-viz accent.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Contexts where users need to read real data — values are synthetic sine noise, not wired to real data.
items.agentPrompt: Change COL to '#ff6b6b' for a red alert theme, reduce M to 60 for fewer data points, and increase shadowBlur to 16 for a stronger glow.
knownLimitations: Data is synthetic (sine+noise) — must replace next() to wire real data
Background color hardcoded in CSS; must edit to change dark navy
Grid always shows 4 horizontal lines with no labels or axis values

items.title: Donut Ring Progress
items.description: Violet-to-cyan gradient donut ring eases its fill to random targets with a leading dot and large centered percentage readout. Tap to jump to a new value.
items.useWhen: Loading screens, dashboard KPI widgets, progress indicators where a glanceable percentage with ambient motion fits the design.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing multiple simultaneous rings or precise, user-controlled progress — the target is randomized automatically.
items.agentPrompt: Change the gradient colors from violet/cyan to amber/orange by setting A='#ffb347' and B='#ff6b35', then increase ring thickness by changing lw=R*0.34 to lw=R*0.44.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to #161226 — must edit CSS to use on light backgrounds
Label reads 'LOAD' — purely cosmetic, must be changed for non-loading contexts

items.title: Sparkline Moving Dot
items.description: A green sparkline traces itself across a faint ghost path, led by a haloed white dot; on completion it regenerates a new random 28-point series.
items.useWhen: Dashboard widgets, metric cards, ambient data displays needing lightweight motion without real data.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring real data binding — series is randomly generated; also avoid when motion competes with dense UI.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent color from #3ee08f to #38bdf8, increase point count from N=28 to N=40, and slow the trace cycle from 4200ms to 6000ms.
editableAreas: vertical padding range (top H*0.22, bot H*0.78)
dot radius (arc r=4) and halo radius (arc r=7)
knownLimitations: Data is randomly generated — no API or real data binding
Background color is hardcoded in CSS (#0c1512); must edit to change theme

items.title: Radial Gauge Needle
items.description: Semicircular gauge on dark amber background with green-yellow-red arc segments; a glowing white needle sweeps smoothly via sine wave with a live 0–100 readout.
items.useWhen: Dashboard widgets, metric displays, loading/progress indicators with a data-viz aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Real-time data inputs — needle auto-cycles via sine wave; wire to actual data and remove the phase loop before production use.
items.agentPrompt: Change the accent glow color from #ffb347 to #00eaff, narrow the red zone to start at 0.9 instead of 0.8, and slow the sweep by changing phase += 0.02 to phase += 0.01.
knownLimitations: Needle auto-cycles via sine wave — must replace phase/tgt logic to bind real data
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#1a1410) — must edit to change dark amber base

items.title: Radar Pulse
items.description: Six-axis teal radar chart on dark navy with animated polygon vertices pulsing via sine waves and a rotating sweep line. Click reshuffles the data.
items.useWhen: Skill or stats dashboards, ambient data displays, dark-mode hero backgrounds with a data-driven aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing real data binding — values are randomized on load. Light backgrounds without CSS overrides.
items.agentPrompt: Change axis count to 8 by setting AX=8, shift the accent color from #52e0d4 to #a78bfa, and slow the sweep rotation by changing phase*0.9 to phase*0.4.
knownLimitations: Data is randomly generated on load — no real data binding
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0a1424); must edit to change theme
Sweep line uses a linear gradient recreated every frame — minor GC pressure at high DPR

items.title: Heatmap Ripple
items.description: 12x6 grid of rounded cells colored via a magma ramp, with a sine-wave ripple emanating from a point that orbits and follows the cursor.
items.useWhen: Data dashboard accents, ambient background panels, or any context needing a living heatmap visualization with pointer interactivity.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring actual data binding — values are procedural, not driven by real datasets. Avoid on low-contrast light backgrounds (dark canvas hardcoded).
items.agentPrompt: Change COLS to 16 and ROWS to 8 to increase grid density, then shift the magma ramp's hottest stop from [255,230,150] to [255,255,255] for a white-hot peak.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (reduce flag stops phase advance and orbit)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to #120a18 — must edit CSS to use on light themes
Ripple is purely decorative, not data-driven

items.title: Odometer Count-Up
items.description: Six-digit mechanical odometer with rolling digit reels easing toward a random REQUESTS/SEC target; tap/click to randomize a new target value.
items.useWhen: Dashboards, live metric displays, or hero stats counters needing a tactile mechanical feel.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring exact real-time data binding — target is random; wire tgt externally before shipping.
items.agentPrompt: Change the label to 'USERS ONLINE', set the accent color COL to '#ff9f43', and slow the easing by changing 0.045 to 0.02.
knownLimitations: Target value is random — must replace tgt assignment with external data source for real metrics
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0d0f14); must edit to use on light backgrounds

items.title: Bubble Pack Jiggle
items.description: 14 multicolor gradient bubbles pack toward center with soft collision relaxation and a gentle sine jiggle; click repacks with new random sizes.
items.useWhen: Ambient data-viz backgrounds, proportional category charts, or decorative looping heroes where organic motion suits the brand.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing labeled data — bubbles carry no text. Avoid on low-end devices if many bubbles are stacked (O(N²) collision checks).
items.agentPrompt: Change bubble count to 20 by setting N=20, swap the palette to warm tones (['#ff7043','#ffa726','#ffee58','#ef5350','#ab47bc']), and slow the jiggle by reducing phase increment from dt/600 to dt/1200.
knownLimitations: O(N²) collision loop — keep N under ~30 for smooth mobile perf
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#06121a) — must edit to change from dark navy
No bubble labels — purely decorative, not suitable for readable data charts

items.title: Candlestick Ticker
items.description: 22 green/red candlesticks scroll left continuously, generating random OHLC data; a dashed last-price line with live label updates in real time.
items.useWhen: Finance dashboards, trading UI mockups, ambient data-viz backgrounds for fintech products.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing real data — all prices are procedurally generated. Not suitable where motion competes with dense text content.
items.agentPrompt: Change UP color to '#00cfff' and DN color to '#ff9500', increase candle count to 30 (N=30), and slow scroll speed by changing 1100 to 1800.
knownLimitations: Price scale is normalized 0–100 internally — not real market data
Pointerdown resets chart entirely (init()) which may surprise users expecting click-to-pause
Background color hardcoded to #0a0f0d in CSS

items.title: Streamgraph Drift
items.description: Five stacked blue ribbons flow as a streamgraph using bezier curves and layered sines; ribbons swell organically with a glowing right-edge data-entry seam.
items.useWhen: Dashboard hero sections, analytics loading screens, ambient data-flow backgrounds on dark UIs.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (dark navy hardcoded). Contexts where actual data values need to be read — this is decorative only.
items.agentPrompt: Change the color palette from blue to warm amber/gold by replacing the hues array with ['#8f4a1a','#d06a20','#ff8c38','#ffb870','#ffddb0'] and set background to #1a1008.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0e1424) — must edit to change theme
Streamgraph shows synthetic noise data only, not real data series
Pointer boost decays quickly; sustained motion needed for lasting effect

items.title: Slope Chart Crossing
items.description: Nine labeled lines connect BEFORE and AFTER rank axes, animating crossings each loop as series shuffle to new positions in warm amber tones.
items.useWhen: Visualizing ranked list changes over time — A/B test results, survey rank shifts, league table movements.
items.avoidWhen: More than 9 series (labels will collide). Light backgrounds — color palette is hardcoded dark brown.
items.agentPrompt: Change N to 6, update NAMES to "ABCDEF", and set loopDur to 120 to make a faster 6-series chart.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded (#1a1410) — must edit CSS to change dark theme
Pointer nudge only speeds up animation, no interactive selection of lines
Label collision possible if N exceeds 9 at small canvas heights

items.title: Scatter Regression Settle
items.description: 46 teal dots fly in, jitter, then settle as a glowing regression line and confidence band sweep to fit. Pearson r reveals as the line converges.
items.useWhen: Dashboard hero widgets, statistics explainers, data literacy demos, or ambient looping data-art backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring interactive exploration of real data — points and regression are hardcoded. Low-motion environments get a static late-phase frame only.
items.agentPrompt: Change point count to 30 (N=30), increase noise to 0.26 (gauss()*0.26), and shift accent color to coral by replacing AC='#2fd2b0' with AC='#ff6b6b'.
knownLimitations: Data is fully synthetic and hardcoded — not wired to real data sources
Confidence band is a visual approximation, not a statistically rigorous interval
pointermove nudges internal state but has no visible effect beyond a minor timing shift

items.title: Treemap Subdivide
items.description: 11 violet-to-magenta rounded tiles fill the canvas as a squarified treemap; values shift each cycle and tiles smoothly interpolate to new sizes and positions.
items.useWhen: Ambient data dashboards, portfolio backgrounds, or any context needing a living layout visualization without specific data labels.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring readable labels or precise data — tiles carry no text. Low-end devices with many resize events may stutter during re-layout.
items.agentPrompt: Change leaf count to 8 (N=8), shift hue band to teal (start at 160), and slow the morph transition by changing the t increment from 0.012 to 0.007.
knownLimitations: Click triggers immediate morph but only when t>=1 (mid-transition clicks are ignored)
No aria or semantic data — purely decorative, unsuitable as an accessible chart
Hue is per-index not per-value so color rank does not track value rank across morphs

items.title: Contour Breathing
items.description: 11 teal contour lines trace a living topographic map of 5 drifting gaussian hills; lines pulse and breathe as hills orbit and a ripple wave shifts the field.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, data-art installations, ambient screensavers with a scientific or terrain aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark navy #101820). Contexts needing legible text overlays — contour lines fill the entire canvas.

items.title: Beeswarm Collide

items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible content overlays or low-end devices — per-frame DOM style writes across many hinge elements may cause jank.
items.agentPrompt: Change the base unit to U=160 for a larger crane, swap paper colors P1/P2/P3 to cool blues, and slow the breath by changing phase+=0.0075 to phase+=0.004.
knownLimitations: Per-frame inline style writes on every hinge and face element may cause layout thrash on older browsers
No aria semantics — add aria-hidden in production
Pointer yaw only tracks X axis; no vertical tilt tracking

items.title: Vanishing Point Grid
items.description: Teal neon floor-and-ceiling grid rushes toward a glowing vanishing-point core. Pointermove and click boost speed; motion-blur trail from partial canvas fade.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, sci-fi or retro-futurist themes, loading screens, or any ambient tunnel effect.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Content overlays — intense motion competes with legible text.
items.agentPrompt: Change grid color from teal to magenta by replacing all 'rgba(45,212,191' with 'rgba(236,72,153' and core glow '#cffff6' to '#fce7f3'.
preserveElements: gradients rebuilt on resize only (hazeGrad, coreGrad, vignGrad)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#070b14) — must change both CSS and canvas fill to retheme
No reduced-motion fallback animation — shows a single static dark frame
Pointer boost decays but never fully resets until next pointermove

items.title: Gyroscope Rings
items.description: Three golden gimbal rings spin on independent axes around a glowing core, slowly precessing like a gyroscope. Pointer tilts the whole assembly.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero sections, mechanical or engineering themes, ambient background accent with depth.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark brown). Contexts where constant 3D rotation competes with foreground content.
items.agentPrompt: Change ring color to silver by setting .gyr-seg background to linear-gradient(180deg,#e8e8e8,#888), increase SEGS to 60 for smoother rings, and slow precession by changing gyr-prec to 22s.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to dark brown (#1a1410) in CSS
Ring geometry built entirely from flat divs — no true toroid mesh, so segments visible at high zoom
Pointer nudge disabled under reduced-motion

items.title: Folded Map Terrain
items.description: 12x12 quad grid forms rolling sine hills in isometric view with face-normal sun lighting. Pointer skews terrain phase; click boosts amplitude.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative art displays, ambient terrain or map-themed sections.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (dark navy hardcoded). Content-heavy layouts where surface motion competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change grid resolution from G=12 to G=18, shift sun to {x:0.5,y:-0.8,z:0.3} for side lighting, and reduce cell size from 72 to 60 to keep quads in frame.
knownLimitations: O(G^2) quads per frame — G beyond 20 may drop FPS on low-end devices
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0f2417)
No aria role on canvas — purely decorative

items.title: Exploded Cube Bloom
items.description: A pink neon wireframe cube continuously spins on two axes while breathing between sealed and exploded states; pointer and click amplify the bloom burst.
items.useWhen: Dark-theme hero sections, tech/cyberpunk brand headers, ambient 3D loop backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark magenta bg). Content-heavy layouts where persistent 3D motion competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change the neon color from pink to electric cyan (#00eaff), slow the spin speed by halving ry (t*11 instead of t*22), and increase explode travel to 1.5.
preserveElements: transform-style:preserve-3d on both rig and faces
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit to change from dark magenta
push decay (0.95) means pointer/click effect fades quickly; increase to 0.98 for longer bloom hold

items.title: Depth-Sorted Petals
items.description: 44 pink gradient petals arranged in 4 concentric rings open and close in 3D perspective, depth-sorted back-to-front around a glowing central hub.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, floral or organic themes, ambient looping art installations.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded deep plum). Contexts needing legible foreground text — petals fill the viewport.
items.agentPrompt: Change petal color to blue-violet by replacing the rgba(232,121,185,...) gradient stops with rgba(139,92,246,...) and updating the hub gradient to match.
preserveElements: manual back-to-front depth sort (quads.sort by zc)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and fillRect — must change both
No aria semantics; purely decorative canvas
nudge decay via pointer/click adds mild interactivity but no persistent state

items.title: Helical DNA Stair
items.description: 26 CSS 3D rungs twist into a rotating DNA double-helix staircase with depth-faded opacity; pointer drag and click add momentum to the spin.
items.useWhen: Science/biotech hero sections, ambient background loops, CSS 3D capability demos.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring text legibility over the animation; low-end mobile where 26 transformed divs plus rAF may cause jank.

knownLimitations: All geometry is rebuilt on resize via innerHTML clear — brief flash on window resize
perspective hardcoded at 760px; very wide viewports may look flat

items.title: Stereographic Star Dome
items.description: 150 billboard stars placed on a CSS 3D hemisphere slowly wheel about the polar axis; pointer nudges spin speed and clicking accelerates rotation.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/astronomy themes, ambient looping screensavers requiring depth.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded near-black), low-end mobile (150 DOM nodes with 3D transforms), or layouts needing legible text overlays.

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded as #05060f — must edit CSS to change
150 3D-transformed DOM nodes can stress mobile GPU despite no per-star will-change
Pointer nudge only responds to horizontal axis (clientX); no vertical influence

items.title: Gravity Dot Rain
items.description: Multicolored dots fall under gravity with motion trails, bounce off the floor, and scatter away from the cursor on a dark navy canvas.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, loading screens, ambient screensaver effects with subtle physics feel.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark navy). Layouts where motion competes with legible content.

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit to change from dark navy
Reduced-motion renders only one static frame with no fallback animation
No IIFE wrapper — globals (drops, pointer, pal) leak into page scope

items.title: Firework Burst
items.description: Colorful glowing sparks burst radially, fall under gravity, and fade against a dark sky. Auto-launches bursts; click anywhere to add more.
items.useWhen: Dark-theme hero backgrounds, celebration screens, loading states that benefit from festive ambient motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (sky hardcoded near-black). Contexts where motion competes with readable content or users may have motion sensitivity.
items.agentPrompt: Change the hue palette to warm golds only by setting hues=[40,45,50,55,60], increase particle count per burst by changing n=28+(Math.random()*16|0) to n=50+(Math.random()*20|0).

Background color hardcoded in CSS (#06060f) — must edit to change from near-black
No IIFE wrapper — global vars could collide on pages with other scripts

items.title: Confetti Cannon
items.description: Colored rectangles fire from bottom corners in auto-cycling bursts, tumbling with gravity and flip animation. Click anywhere to trigger a cursor burst.
items.useWhen: Celebration moments, success screens, gamification rewards, party or event landing pages.
items.avoidWhen: Productivity or focused reading contexts — constant auto-firing is highly distracting. Remove the auto-fire interval for production click-only use.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to pastels by replacing pal with ['#ffb3c6','#ffd6a5','#caffbf','#a0c4ff','#e8b4f8','#ffc6ff'], and increase gravity from 0.13 to 0.18 for faster fall.

knownLimitations: Auto-fires from corners continuously — remove the t>next block for click-only production use
Particle cap (100) can cause burst suppression under heavy click-spam
No aria role on canvas — click interaction is invisible to assistive tech

items.title: Bouncing Balls
items.description: 7–14 glossy pastel balls bounce off walls and collide with elastic physics; cursor repels balls within a 70px radius.
items.useWhen: Ambient physics backgrounds, playful landing pages, or demos showcasing interactive particle systems.
items.avoidWhen: Content-heavy layouts where constant motion distracts from reading; low-end devices sensitive to per-frame O(n²) collision checks.

editableAreas: ball count range (7–14, from W*H/9000 formula)
knownLimitations: O(n²) collision detection — scales poorly beyond ~20 balls
No reduced-motion fallback beyond skipping the animation loop (draws one static frame)
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0a1418)

items.title: Spring Chain
items.description: A 16-node spring chain whips and follows the cursor in a blue-to-purple gradient; drifts in a figure-eight pattern when idle.
items.useWhen: Cursor-follower effects, interactive hero backgrounds, playful physics demos where pointer engagement adds delight.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible overlaid text (constant motion competes). Touch-only devices where pointer events are limited to taps.

knownLimitations: Reduced-motion support is minimal — draws one static frame but the chain is still mid-motion; no true static fallback
Segment length computed at init with W/H at that moment — does not recompute on resize (reinits nodes but seg is const)
No IIFE wrapper — globals leak into page scope

items.title: Cloth Wave Grid
items.description: An 11x11 wireframe grid ripples like cloth via sine/cosine waves in cyan-to-violet hues; mesh nodes bulge away from the cursor on hover.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative-art sections, tech/data-viz aesthetic headers needing ambient motion with subtle interactivity.

Background color hardcoded in CSS (#071018) — must edit HTML to change

items.title: Metaball Fluid

items.title: Boids Flocking

items.useWhen: Ambient hero backgrounds, generative art demos, or any dark-theme context needing organic crowd motion.

items.title: Pointer Trail

items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark fill), content-dense layouts where cursor trails distract from reading, or reduced-motion contexts needing full animation.

Background color hardcoded in CSS and JS fill — two places to change

items.title: Iron Filings Field

items.useWhen: Science-themed hero backgrounds, physics visualizations, ambient dark-mode displays needing elegant generative motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark). Contexts where constant field rotation competes with readable content.

items.title: Sandfall Hourglass

Hourglass shape is purely rectangular mask math — cannot produce curved glass silhouette
pointermove kick only adds extra simulation steps, not a true pointer interaction

items.title: Double Pendulum Ghost
items.description: A double pendulum swings chaotically in purple, tracing a slowly fading color-shifting ribbon ghost on canvas; pointer nudges velocity, click rekicks.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, screensavers, science/math-themed portfolios, ambient generative art displays.

editableAreas: accent hue base (262 in strokeStyle hsla)
trail fade speed (0.012 in fillStyle alpha)
preserveElements: offscreen trail canvas (tr/tctx) for ghost ribbon
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas fill — must edit both to change
No reduced-motion animation fallback beyond a single static frame
RK4 with 8 substeps per frame is CPU-intensive on low-end devices

items.title: Smoke Vortex Street

items.useWhen: Dark ambient backgrounds, fluid-dynamics demos, science or generative-art hero sections.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background is hardcoded dark teal-black). Contexts where pointer interaction competes with UI elements above the canvas.

knownLimitations: Background color is hardcoded in CSS (#0a1416) — must edit to use on non-dark themes
Eddy shedding uses integer modulo (t%period===0) so period must be an integer
Reduced-motion path runs 160 static frames then halts — result may look sparse on large viewports

items.title: N-Body Waltz

Background color hardcoded (#05060f) — must edit CSS to change from deep navy
Soft recentering and leash may cause subtle energy drift in long runs

items.title: Liquid Pour SPH
items.description: 200 SPH fluid particles pour into a basin, slosh, and drain on a slow cycle with additive-blend cyan glow; pointer move tilts the fluid sideways.
items.useWhen: Ambient hero backgrounds for tech/creative sites, loading screens, interactive art installations requiring realistic-feeling fluid.
items.avoidWhen: Low-end mobile or battery-sensitive contexts — double-density SPH relaxation loop runs 2 substeps per frame. Avoid where text legibility over the background matters.
items.agentPrompt: Change the fluid color to molten orange by replacing the glow stops to 'rgba(255,140,30,0.26)' and 'rgba(255,100,10,0.182)', and set REST=3.0 to make the fluid less compressed.

knownLimitations: Spatial hash uses string keys — allocation pressure at high N; switch to integer keys for >300 particles
Particle recycling uses Array.indexOf + splice inside tight loop — O(n) per removed particle
No reduced-motion animation — shows a static settled pool only

items.title: Strange Attractor Swarm
items.description: 560 hot-pink particles trace the Aizawa strange attractor in 3D, glowing with additive blend; pointer spins the view and boosts simulation speed.

items.avoidWhen: Low-end mobile (per-frame N-body loop at 560 particles). Light backgrounds — hardcoded dark purple canvas.

Reduced-motion path uses MORE particles (900) than the animated path (560) for a denser static frame — may confuse future editors

items.title: Verlet Rope Bridge

Background color hardcoded in CSS (#161108)

items.title: Soft-Body Jelly Drop

items.title: Pollen Brownian Drift

items.title: Aurora Ribbons
