items.title: Fractal Tree
items.description: A recursive 7-level fractal tree grows from the base with a wind sway animation; green blossoms appear at tips; pointer horizontal position bends the tree.
items.useWhen: Nature or organic-themed hero backgrounds, generative art sections, ambient screensaver-style displays.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring text legibility over the canvas — dark background is hardcoded and branches fill the viewport.
items.agentPrompt: Change branch depth to 9, set blossom color to pink (change 100 to 320 in the hsla leaf fillStyle), and slow wind sway by setting t*1.2 to t*0.6.
knownLimitations: Recursive branch() redraws every branch every frame — depth 8+ noticeably expensive on mobile
Background color hardcoded dark brown in CSS — must edit both CSS and gradient stops to change
grow-in animation restarts on a 6-second cycle indefinitely

items.title: Reaction-Diffusion Coral
items.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion simulation grows teal-to-coral stripe and spot patterns with glowing contour bands; pointer seeds new growth zones.
items.useWhen: Ambient sci-art backgrounds, generative art demos, biology/nature-themed hero sections, creative portfolio backdrops.
items.avoidWhen: Low-end devices — runs 5 simulation steps per frame on a Float32 grid; heavy on CPU. Any context requiring legible text overlaid on the canvas.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to purple-to-gold by updating the stops array: [[10,5,20],[40,10,80],[120,60,180],[255,180,50],[255,240,200]], then reduce glow intensity by setting the glow multiplier from 0.55 to 0.25.
editableAreas: feed/kill rates (f=0.0367, kk=0.0649) — controls spots vs stripes pattern
preserveElements: low-res offscreen buffer canvas (critical for perf — upscaled via drawImage)
prefers-reduced-motion static render (900 pre-steps then paint)
knownLimitations: CPU-bound: 5 Gray-Scott steps per rAF on a ~148x83 grid — sustained load on low-end devices
No reduced-motion fallback animation — only a single static snapshot is shown
Background color (#0a1418) is hardcoded in CSS; palette only maps chemical concentrations

items.title: Phyllotaxis Sunflower
items.description: 620 amber-gold seeds grow outward in a Fermat spiral via the golden angle; parastichy arms rotate continuously and speed up on pointer or click.
items.useWhen: Nature/organic-themed hero backgrounds, generative art showcases, science or botany education contexts needing an ambient looping pattern.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — the rotating seeds compete visually. Avoid on low-end devices if many other canvas tiles run simultaneously.
items.agentPrompt: Change seed count to 400 by setting N=400, shift palette to blue-violet (hue base 240, rim hue 200), slow rotation by reducing phase increment from 0.0016 to 0.0008.
knownLimitations: Boost decays on pointermove but never fully resets to zero — tiny residual drift remains
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#1a1206) — must edit both CSS and bgGrad stops to retheme
No click toggle state — click only momentarily boosts spin speed

items.title: L-System Fern
items.description: A procedural fern frond grows depth-by-depth from a fiddlehead spiral, uncurling and breathing back in a looping cycle; tips glow bright green as they emerge.
items.useWhen: Nature or botanical themes, ambient generative backgrounds, creative portfolio heroes, or anywhere a slow organic growth loop adds life.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring a static or motionless background; low-end devices where many canvas draw calls per frame may stutter.
items.agentPrompt: Change the base angle unit from AX=0.018 to AX=0.028 for tighter spiral coils, and shift the tip accent color in the tone() function to a warm gold (r=207,g=180,b=60) instead of green.
knownLimitations: Segment count grows large at MAXD=46 — reducing depth significantly cuts draw cost
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#071510) — must edit HTML to change
Glow effect uses composite 'lighter' blending — may look different on non-standard displays

items.title: Slime Mold Network
items.description: Up to 6000 agents simulate Physarum slime-mold behavior, self-organizing into glowing purple radial veins on a dark canvas; cursor attracts nearby agents.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative art displays, science or biology themed UIs, ambient screensaver contexts.
items.avoidWhen: Low-end devices (heavy per-frame agent and diffuse loops). Light backgrounds — background color is hardcoded dark purple-black.
items.agentPrompt: Change the vein color to teal by editing the r/gg/b channel formulas in the paint() function, e.g. set b=20+g*150 and gg=10+g*255 for a green-cyan shift.
editableAreas: vein color channel formula in paint()
preserveElements: low-res sim grid pattern (GMAX=240 cap, critical for perf)
reduced-motion static fallback (240 pre-steps then paint)
knownLimitations: CPU-bound dual loop (agent step + diffuse) — can drop frames on low-end mobile
Sim grid resets on resize, losing all trail state
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0c0a14)

items.title: Voronoi Leaf Veins
items.description: Space-colonization algorithm grows branching leaf veins inside a lime-green silhouette, branch by branch with sparking tips, then fades and regrews in a loop.
items.useWhen: Nature/botanical themes, generative art heroes, ambient backgrounds where organic growth motion adds depth without distraction.
items.avoidWhen: Low-end devices (O(nodes*sources) nearest-neighbor search each frame). Contexts needing legible text overlay — the mid-canvas silhouette competes.
items.agentPrompt: Change the leaf color from lime-green to amber by replacing the strokeStyle RGB values (155,209,74) and fill base (#3a561a) to warm amber equivalents like (209,160,74) and (#563a1a).
editableAreas: vein line width scale (lw multiplier n.w*0.9*(S/420))
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (reduce branch with static frame)
knownLimitations: Nearest-neighbor search is O(nodes×sources) — slows noticeably above ~2000 nodes on low-end CPUs
Pointer adds hormone sources permanently, inflating source array on heavy interaction
Leaf shape and angle are hardcoded — parametric control requires refactoring half() and ang

items.title: Diffusion-Limited Frost
items.description: Six-fold dendritic snowflake grows via diffusion-limited aggregation; arms shimmer white-blue to cyan and cycle through sublimation/refreeze.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, winter/holiday themes, generative art showcases, ambient screensaver-style displays.
items.avoidWhen: Low-end mobile devices — 42 walker iterations per frame is CPU-intensive. Light backgrounds (dark navy is hardcoded).
items.agentPrompt: Change frost colors to warm gold by replacing '#dff4ff','#a8e4ff','#5fb6e8' with '#fff3cc','#ffd966','#e8a230', and slow shimmer by changing t*0.02 to t*0.01.
editableAreas: crystal color palette (3 hex values in draw())
knownLimitations: CPU-bound: 42 DLA iterations per frame may stutter on low-end devices
Background hardcoded to #0a1620 — edit CSS to change
Refreeze cycle resets the full aggregate, causing a brief flash

items.title: Mycelium Bloom
items.description: Branching hyphae grow outward from center using a probabilistic grammar; glow nodes pulse teal where the web is densest. Pointer spawns new growth tips.
items.useWhen: Dark-background hero sections, nature/bio themes, generative art backdrops, loading screens needing calm organic motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark soil color). Contexts where legible text must overlay — persistent glow blooms compete visually.
items.agentPrompt: Change the hyphal color to warm amber by replacing 'rgba(150,196,176,' with 'rgba(196,170,100,' in the grow() segment draw call, and change node glow stops to gold tones (#ffd700).
editableAreas: node glow color stops (rgba values in frame())
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard + static fallback (260 grow() iterations)
grid Float32Array density field (anastomosis logic depends on it)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded (#100b06) — must edit CSS and ctx.fillStyle to change
Node count grows unbounded over long runs; no cap on nodes array
Reduced-motion path renders a static frame only — no node pulse animation

items.title: Lichen Spread
items.description: Crinkle-edged lichen colonies grow in concentric rings over a speckled stone field; pointer nudges the nearest colony to pulse.
items.useWhen: Nature or science-themed ambient backgrounds, generative art hero sections, or any context needing slow organic growth motion.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring legible content overlay — the dense ring pattern competes with text. Avoid on low-end mobile due to per-frame stone blit and speckle loops.
items.agentPrompt: Change the dominant palette to rust/terracotta by replacing palettes[0] with ['#7a4a2e','#b06b3e','#d4956a','#edd5b0'], and set n0 to 6 to reduce colony count.
preserveElements: offscreen stoneCv blit pattern (critical for perf)
knownLimitations: Stone field rebuilt on resize — brief flash on orientation change
No touch-specific interaction beyond pointer events
No aria semantics — purely decorative canvas

items.title: Tide Pool Diatoms
items.description: Five glassy radially-symmetric diatom frustules drift and slowly rotate in deep teal water; tessellated pores twinkle refractively with a lighter-mode glow.
items.useWhen: Ambient scientific or nature-themed backgrounds, biology/ocean UIs, screensaver-style hero sections.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — the additive lighter composite blends with anything placed on top. Light backgrounds need a full restyle.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent color from teal to amber by replacing ACC=[63,214,192] with ACC=[255,180,60], increase rotation speed by doubling each sp value in specs, and add a sixth diatom at x:0.5, y:0.8.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard with static fallback frame
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#04161a) — must edit to use on light backgrounds
Pore count grows quadratically with ring count — large sym+rings combos can slow frame rate
Pointer only boosts rotation speed; no per-diatom hit detection or interaction

items.title: Seedhead Dispersal
items.description: 150 dandelion seeds on a golden-angle spiral drift off one by one on a noise-field breeze; the receptacle slowly glows bare. Click triggers a gust.
items.useWhen: Nature or botanical hero backgrounds, ambient screensaver loops, organic brand aesthetics.
items.avoidWhen: Content-heavy layouts where continuous drift competes with reading. Low-end devices sensitive to per-frame canvas redraws.
items.agentPrompt: Change seed count to 80 by setting N=80, shift pappus color to pale lavender (#d8d0e8), slow release interval from 26 to 40 frames.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard with static fallback frame
knownLimitations: pointermove also sets gust=1 so hovering accelerates dispersal on desktop
Seeds that fly offscreen mark attached=2 but are not freed until full reset cycle
Stem position is hardcoded relative to cx/cy and not configurable

items.title: Voronoi Shatter
items.description: 14 drifting sites partition the canvas into cool-blue Voronoi mosaic cells; moving the pointer nudges the nearest site toward the cursor.
items.useWhen: Dark-theme hero backgrounds, generative art showcases, geometric texture layers behind UI.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Low-end mobile — per-frame cell loop scales with canvas area.
items.agentPrompt: Change site count to 20 by setting N=20, shift hue range to warm tones (h:rnd(20,50)), slow drift by changing the 0.004 multiplier to 0.002.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change both to retheme
Pointer nudge captures md/mdy variables but never uses them (dead code)
Cell loop is O(N*cells) — large N or small cell size tanks perf on large screens

items.title: Auto-Maze
items.description: Depth-first maze carves itself wall by wall on a dark grid with shifting hue; a bright dot marks the active cell. Resets with a new color on completion.
items.useWhen: Generative art backgrounds, loading screens, or algorithm visualization demos that benefit from a hypnotic self-drawing pattern.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays or low-end mobile — continuous rAF loop with full redraw each frame consumes moderate CPU.
items.agentPrompt: Change cell size by setting the divisor from 16 to 12 in `cell=Math.max(10,Math.round(s/16))`, and shift starting hue to purple via `hue=270`.
knownLimitations: Grid is always square — non-square viewports leave margins on the longer axis
Reduced-motion shows only a static fully-carved maze, no animated fallback

items.title: Truchet Tiles
items.description: 8x8 grid of rainbow quarter-arc Truchet tiles that flip orientation in slow sine waves, weaving shifting interlocked curves across a dark background.
items.useWhen: Generative art backgrounds, creative portfolio heroes, or anywhere a hypnotic geometric pattern is needed without heavy compute.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible text overlaid — rainbow hues and constant flipping compete with copy. Not suited to light backgrounds without restyling.
items.agentPrompt: Change the grid size to 12x12 by setting n=12 in build(), shift the color to cool blues by changing the hue formula to (t*0.02+x*12+y*12+200)%360, and thicken the stroke to cell*0.22.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and JS fillStyle — must change both
Grid is always square; non-square layouts require refactoring ox/oy math
Click flips only base orientation (r), not the live flip — effect is subtle during wave motion

items.title: Spirograph
items.description: A hypotrochoid spirograph traced progressively on canvas with a shifting hue; each cycle completes then resets with new random radii and color.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative art showcases, math/geometry-themed pages needing ambient motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark navy). Contexts needing static or text-legible overlays.
items.agentPrompt: Change the hue rotation speed from 30 to 60 in the strokeStyle line, increase lineWidth from 1.4 to 2.5, and set the starting hue to a fixed value like 200 for a consistent blue palette.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and fillRect — must change both to alter backdrop
pointerdown boost is subtle; no visual feedback on click
cyc computed from rounded R/r may produce very long cycles for certain random values

items.title: L-System Plant
items.description: An L-system fractal plant grows branch by branch from the canvas bottom, swaying gently; clicking triggers a wobble and regrows a randomized plant.
items.useWhen: Nature or generative art backgrounds, procedural demo showcases, ambient desktop wallpaper loops.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring legible text overlays — the incremental draw loop repaints constantly. Low-end devices with very small viewports may stutter during grow phase.
items.agentPrompt: Change hue base to 200 for a blue-teal palette, increase L-system iterations from 4 to 5, and slow growth speed by changing grow+=0.006 to grow+=0.003.
knownLimitations: L-system string for 4 iterations is long — bumping to 5+ iterations may cause jank during the grow phase
No aria role on canvas; purely decorative with no keyboard interaction
sway wobble resets on every pointerdown but does not animate smoothly back to zero on slow devices

items.title: Rotating Mandala
items.description: 12-fold mandala of 5 nested polygon rings that counter-spin, breathe in scale, and cycle through purple-pink hues. Tap adds a spin impulse.
items.useWhen: Ambient backgrounds for creative or generative art contexts. Hero sections needing mesmerizing looping visuals with subtle user interactivity.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark purple). Layouts where continuous motion competes with foreground text.
items.agentPrompt: Change symmetry from 12 to 8 by setting sym=8, increase ring count to 7, and shift hue base by changing the formula to (t*0.02+ring*45+20)%360.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#160a1e) — must edit to change from dark purple
Reduced-motion renders a single static frame only
Spin impulse on pointerdown decays (spin*=0.96) — no persistent user control

items.title: Moiré Interference
items.description: Three drifting concentric ring sets in cyan, pink, and green blend additively to create shifting moiré patterns. Pointer steers one ring center.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative art displays, ambient panels where optical interference adds visual depth.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Users sensitive to repetitive optical interference patterns or motion.
items.agentPrompt: Change the cyan rings color to gold ('rgba(255,200,50,0.35)') and increase ring spacing from 10 to 14 for a more open pattern.
knownLimitations: No reduced-motion animation fallback — shows a single static frame only
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fill — edit both to change
Ring wobble uses raw ms timestamp — speed tweaks are non-linear

items.title: Sierpinski Zoom
items.description: A Sierpinski triangle fractal endlessly zooms into itself with rainbow-cycling hues in a seamless self-similar loop. Tap to burst the zoom speed.
items.useWhen: Dark ambient backgrounds, math/generative-art showcases, screensaver-style displays needing perpetual motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark brown canvas). Contexts where constant high-motion competes with readable content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the zoom period to 4000 for faster cycling, set depth from 6 to 7 for finer detail, and shift base hue by adding 120 to the hue calculation so colors start in the green range.
preserveElements: seamless scale wrap (Math.pow(2,z) with modulo period)
knownLimitations: Recursive canvas fill calls — depth>7 may stutter on low-end devices
Background color is hardcoded in both CSS and JS fillRect — must change both
No aria label on canvas element

items.title: Perlin Flow-Field
items.description: 100 blue-violet particles stream along a value-noise flow field on dark navy; cursor deflects nearby particles within a 120px radius.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative art demos, ambient looping canvases where subtle interactivity rewards exploration.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Contexts requiring legible text overlays — trails accumulate over content.
items.agentPrompt: Change particle count from N=100 to 200, shift hue range from 190–250 to warm amber (30–60), and increase deflection radius from 120 to 180.
knownLimitations: Value-noise function is a sine approximation — lacks true Perlin coherence at large scales
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fill — must update both to change theme
No touch pointer support beyond pointermove (works but no explicit touch handler)

items.title: Kaleidoscope
items.description: 10-fold mirrored kaleidoscope of rotating polygon blobs on a deep plum background; tap/click spins the pattern and regenerates blobs.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, screensavers, generative art showcases, or any ambient loop needing hypnotic symmetry.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark plum). Contexts where users need to focus on text or UI controls.
items.agentPrompt: Change SEG from 10 to 8 for 8-fold symmetry, shift blob hues toward teal by replacing the random hue with a range of 150+Math.random()*80, and slow rotation by changing t*0.0002 to t*0.0001.
knownLimitations: Reduced-motion path draws a single static frame but still runs the rAF loop (blobs update silently)
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and fillRect — must change both to retheme
Blob hues are fully random on each init; no palette control

items.title: Apollonian Gasket
items.description: Recursive Apollonian circle packing with infinite slow zoom; circles shift from gold to blue by depth, with vignette and pointer/click nudge.
items.useWhen: Math/science landing pages, generative art backdrops, contemplative infinite-zoom fractal backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible overlaid text — the constant zoom and vignette compete with reading. Low-end devices may stutter.
items.agentPrompt: Change the color palette from gold-to-blue to magenta-to-cyan by editing the cr/cg/cb formula: set cr=Math.round(220-heat*80), cg=Math.round(60+heat*140), cb=Math.round(180+heat*60).
knownLimitations: Hundreds of arc calls per frame — heavier on low-end devices at high DPR
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillStyle — must change both to retheme
Depth-fade bands shift if MAX recursion depth is changed without recalibrating visD

items.title: Penrose Aperiodic
items.description: Penrose rhombus tiling via recursive deflation, recoloured by a sine wave radiating outward in gold, rose, and plum. Pointer nudges wave; click pulses.
items.useWhen: Generative art hero sections, math/science landing pages, ambient dark-background displays where geometric complexity is the centrepiece.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring text legibility on top — the dense tiling and shifting colours compete with overlaid content. Low-end devices may stutter at depth 6.
items.agentPrompt: Change the accent colour from gold to electric cyan by replacing C_ACC=[212,175,106] with C_ACC=[0,220,210] and C_PALE=[233,221,201] with C_PALE=[180,255,255].
editableAreas: deflation depth (depth 5 or 6 based on viewport size)
colour palette constants (C_BG, C_ACC, C_DEEP, C_ROSE, C_PALE)
knownLimitations: Depth-6 deflation generates thousands of triangles — may drop frames on low-end mobile
No animated reduced-motion fallback beyond a single static draw
Rhombus edges suppressed visually but triangles not merged structurally

items.title: Reaction Diffusion
items.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion simulation morphing between coral, spots, and maze patterns on a 128x128 grid; teal-to-bone color ramp on near-black.
items.useWhen: Ambient generative backgrounds, science/nature themes, creative portfolio hero sections needing organic texture.
items.avoidWhen: Low-end devices — runs 5-8 simulation steps per frame on a pixel loop. Contexts requiring legible text overlays or bright backgrounds.
items.agentPrompt: Change the color ramp stops array to warm amber/orange tones (e.g. replace [57,217,138] with [255,160,50]) and increase GW/GH to 192 for sharper detail.
preserveElements: reduced-motion static fallback (3200 pre-steps then draw)
knownLimitations: CPU-bound per-pixel loop — heavy at large grid sizes
128x128 grid upscaled via CSS pixelated rendering — sharp but blocky at large viewport
No touch-specific pointer handling; pointermove on mobile may feel sluggish

items.title: Strange Attractor
items.description: De Jong strange attractor rendered as a smoky pink density cloud on deep purple; coefficients drift via sine clocks so the shape continuously morphs.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative art displays, screensavers, or anywhere a continuously evolving mathematical form adds depth.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark purple). Low-end devices — 90k iterations per frame with pixel-level tone mapping is CPU-intensive.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent color from pink (#ff5d8f) to electric cyan (#00eaff) by updating the rgb values in the r/g/bl tone-map lines (target 0,234,255), and slow the drift by reducing t += 0.0032 to t += 0.0015.
editableAreas: accent color in tone-map r/g/bl lines
knownLimitations: 90k iterations per frame is CPU-bound — heavy on low-end mobile
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#11001f) — must edit both CSS and tone-map bg values to recolor
Click nudge only shifts t; no visual feedback of state change

items.title: Hilbert Weave
items.description: A Hilbert space-filling curve draws itself as a glowing teal-to-violet ribbon with a leading spark, cycling through orders 2–5 and looping continuously.
items.useWhen: Generative art backgrounds, math/algorithm showcase sections, dark-themed hero panels needing ambient geometric motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Contexts where high segment-count draw loops at order 5 (1024 cells) may stress low-end CPUs.
items.agentPrompt: Change the hue sweep from teal-violet to amber-rose by setting the base hue to 30 and the sweep range to 120 (line: `const h=(168+f*150)%360` → `const h=(30+f*120)%360`).
editableAreas: hue base and sweep range (168 + f*150)
order range (2..5 in the order++ loop)
knownLimitations: Per-segment draw loop scales as O(n²) cells — order 5 draws 1023 segments twice per frame (glow + core), may drop frames on slow hardware
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#021016) — must edit both CSS and ctx.fillStyle to change

items.title: Circuit Routing
items.description: Glowing green circuit traces auto-route between grid pads at 45/90 degrees with travelling light pulses; traces grow, hold, then fade in a continuous loop.
items.useWhen: Tech/electronics hero backgrounds, PCB or hardware product pages, dark-mode ambient displays needing a coded aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark green). Contexts where constant trace spawning competes with foreground content.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent color from green to amber by setting ACC='#ffb830' and updating the rgba base strings in drawPath and the pad fill to match.
knownLimitations: Greedy router can fail to complete long routes in dense grids, silently dropping the net
Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas fill — must change both to retheme
No aria semantics on canvas

items.title: Wave Interference
items.description: Four orbiting sources emit ripples drawn as glowing blue marching-squares contour lines on near-black. Pointer adds a fifth interactive wave source.
items.useWhen: Science/physics-themed hero backgrounds, generative art displays, dark ambient UI backdrops needing mathematical elegance.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy), low-end mobile (marching-squares grid is CPU-bound), or contexts needing legible foreground text.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent color from blue to green by replacing 'rgba(122,184,255' with 'rgba(100,255,160', increase grid resolution by changing cell to Math.max(5,m/80), and add a fifth source to the SRC array.
editableAreas: source orbit params (ox/oy/or/os/k per SRC entry)
knownLimitations: Marching-squares loop over the full grid runs every frame — heavy on low-end devices
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0a0e27) and fillRect — must change both to retheme
Pointer nudge fades (nudge*=0.95) but never fully zeroes — minor residual effect persists

items.title: Cellular Automaton
items.description: 1D elementary cellular automaton scrolls downward row-by-row, cycling through rules 30/90/110 and more; oldest rows fade, newest glow at the wavefront.
items.useWhen: Dark ambient backgrounds, generative/algorithmic art displays, screensaver-style loops, math or science visualizations.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (black hardcoded). Contexts needing legible text overlays — the constant vertical motion competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change the rule cycle to show only Rule 30 and Rule 110 by setting RULES=[30,110], and slow the scroll to every 5 frames by changing acc%3 to acc%5.
knownLimitations: Background hardcoded to black — must edit CSS and ctx.fillStyle to change theme
Click jumps to next rule but reseeds immediately, causing a visible flash
No aria label on the canvas click target

items.title: Wang Tiles
items.description: Aperiodic Wang-tile mosaic of four-wedge tiles that domino-flip in a diagonal cascade with matched-seam glow on warm earth tones.
items.useWhen: Generative art backgrounds, loading screens, or any context needing mathematically structured infinite pattern variety.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring legible text overlays or low-end devices where per-frame grid iteration may drop frames.
items.agentPrompt: Change PAL to cool blues and greens (e.g. ['#3b82f6','#22d3ee','#6366f1','#10b981']), increase tile size by setting S=Math.max(48, Math.round(m/5)), and slow the cascade by changing t+=0.012.
preserveElements: Wang tile constraint logic (findTile top/left matching)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change both to retheme
Auto-regenerates on click (cycle=999) which may feel abrupt
Seam glow skipped entirely under reduced-motion

items.title: Poisson Disk Bloom
items.description: Gold Poisson-disk points bloom from center on dark olive, linked by a Gabriel graph. Each vertex flashes on arrival; click re-seeds, pointer plants new nodes.
items.useWhen: Ambient generative backgrounds, data-viz aesthetics, creative portfolio heroes where organic graph growth fits the brand.
items.avoidWhen: Low-end mobile (CPU-bound edge draw). Contexts needing legible text overlays — additive blend competes with content.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent to cyan by setting ACC=[80,220,220], tighten spacing by changing the radius divisor from 13 to 9, and lower the cap from CAP=1100 to CAP=600.
knownLimitations: CPU-bound per-frame edge traversal — perf degrades above ~800 points on low-end devices
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fill — must change both to retheme
Gabriel check scans only a 5x5 cell neighborhood; rare long edges may slip through on sparse layouts

items.title: CRT scanline screen
items.description: Green-phosphor CRT terminal: rolling CSS scanlines, vignette, glowing oscilloscope wave, blinking boot-text rows, and random canvas glitch flashes.
items.useWhen: Retro/hacker themed hero sections, loading screens, terminal-aesthetic UI backgrounds, or dark-mode displays needing CRT nostalgia.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark green-black). Contexts where animation competes with readable content overlaid on top.
items.agentPrompt: Change boot text by editing the cols string (e.g. replace '> SYS BOOT OK' with '> HELLO WORLD'), then swap phosphor color from '#3ef08a' to '#ffb347' for amber.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (disables glitch + stops t increment)
half-resolution canvas for pixelated CRT feel
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillStyle — must edit both to change palette
Glitch flashes fully disabled under prefers-reduced-motion
Half-resolution canvas may appear soft on high-DPI displays despite image-rendering:pixelated

items.title: VHS tracking distortion
items.description: VHS test-pattern color bars with 46-slice horizontal jitter, random tear events, a rolling tracking bar, and chroma-split REC text on a dark magenta background.
items.useWhen: Retro/lo-fi hero backgrounds, VHS-aesthetic landing pages, glitch art screensavers, or 80s/90s nostalgia UI themes.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays or calm ambient motion — the constant jitter and tear make reading difficult and can be visually fatiguing.
items.agentPrompt: Change the color bars palette from the current 5-color array to a classic SMPTE set by replacing bands with ['#c0c0c0','#c0c000','#00c0c0','#00c000','#c000c0','#0000c0','#000000'], and slow the animation by changing t+=0.03 to t+=0.015.
editableAreas: slice jitter intensity (Math.sin multiplier *2 and random range *40-20)
preserveElements: canvas self-drawImage slice loop (critical for scanline effect without pixel readback)
knownLimitations: Canvas self-drawImage compositing accumulates noise per frame — clearing with fillRect each tick partially resets but jitter bleeds; on some GPU/browser combos edges artifact
Canvas resolution fixed at 55% of viewport — sharp on retina but pixelated look is intentional; changing the ratio alters the VHS aesthetic
No click or hover interactivity — purely ambient

items.title: Pixel-art sprite march
items.description: Three rows of 8x8 two-frame pixel sprites march across a scrolling starfield at varying speeds; pointer horizontal position controls march speed.
items.useWhen: Retro game aesthetic headers, 8-bit themed landing pages, looping background decoration with nostalgic pixel style.
items.avoidWhen: Designs requiring high-fidelity visuals or clean modern aesthetics. Low-end devices where canvas rAF loops at fixed 160x160 upscaled may blur at large sizes.
items.agentPrompt: Add a fourth sprite row by appending {col:'#ff9f3f', y:0.63, sp:1.2, off:45} to the rows array and adjust existing y values to space evenly.
editableAreas: row colors and speeds (rows array col/sp)
animation frame rate (t*6*row.sp for leg toggle)
knownLimitations: Canvas fixed at 160x160 virtual pixels — upscaling via CSS may produce blur in non-pixelated browsers
Reduced-motion freezes animation entirely rather than showing a static fallback frame
Sprite frame-bob offset (frame?-2:0) is hardcoded and not parameterized

items.title: ASCII shimmer
items.description: Grid of ASCII ramp characters shimmers through interfering radial and plasma waves in green-teal hues; character density and wave center follow the pointer.
items.useWhen: Retro/terminal-aesthetic hero backgrounds, hacker-themed UIs, or ambient screensaver displays on dark backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Light-color UIs (background hardcoded dark green-black). Contexts requiring legible foreground text — the shimmer competes with readability.
items.agentPrompt: Change the character ramp from " .:-=+*#%@" to " ░▒▓█", shift the hue base from 140 to 220 for a blue palette, and slow the wave speed by changing t+=0.035 to t+=0.018.
preserveElements: DPR-independent canvas sizing with cell cap
knownLimitations: No DPR scaling — canvas renders at CSS pixel resolution, looks soft on high-DPI displays
Cell size cap logic (divisor 46) may leave noticeable gaps at very wide aspect ratios

items.title: Dot-matrix ticker
items.description: Amber LED dot-matrix marquee scrolling GAME OVER / INSERT COIN / HIGH SCORE across a dim dot grid. Custom 5x7 bitmap font with pulsing brightness per column.
items.useWhen: Retro/arcade-themed hero sections, game-over screens, loading screens, or any dark-background display needing an authentic LED ticker feel.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark brown). Contexts needing readable arbitrary text — only uppercase A-Z glyphs are defined in the font map.
items.agentPrompt: Change the marquee message to ' ★ LEVEL UP ★ PLAYER ONE ★ ', set the lit-dot color to green (change rgb values to 20,255,80), and slow the scroll speed from 1.3 to 0.7.

preserveElements: precomputed bg canvas (critical for perf — avoids redrawing dim grid each frame)
knownLimitations: Font map covers only ~17 characters — lowercase letters and punctuation beyond ★ are silently replaced with spaces
No DPR scaling — may appear soft on high-density displays
Background color is hardcoded in both CSS and JS; must change in two places

items.title: Neon arcade sign
items.description: Pink neon ARCADE sign with CSS flicker animations and a yellow chasing-light marquee around a glowing pink border frame.
items.useWhen: Retro gaming, arcade, or entertainment themes. Dark-mode hero sections needing ambient neon atmosphere.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark purple). Contexts where flicker could affect users with photosensitivity.

place() + resize listener for lamp positioning
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit to change dark purple
Flicker animations may be problematic for photosensitive users; reduced-motion disables all animation but no intermediate low-motion option exists

items.title: Fake terminal typing

items.title: Datamosh blocks

items.title: Chromatic aberration pulse

items.title: 8-bit loading bar

items.title: Bad VRAM Sweep

items.title: JPEG Quantize Crush

items.title: FAB Speed Dial
items.description: Pink FAB rotates plus-to-X and fans three labeled mini action buttons on a springy arc with overshoot; auto-cycles open/close as a demo.
items.useWhen: Mobile-style UIs needing a contextual action menu, creative portfolios, or any layout where a compact floating action button should reveal multiple options.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring immediate access to actions — auto-cycles by default; remove the phase-transition timer before shipping in production. Avoid on extremely small viewports under 160px.
items.agentPrompt: Change the three labels to ['Share', 'Edit', 'Delete'], update icons to match, and slow the open animation by setting T.open to 0.9.
editableAreas: mini button count and icons (icons array)
knownLimitations: Auto-cycles open/close — remove phase-transition block in step() for production use
Mini buttons lack aria roles; add role=button + aria-label for accessibility
Background color hardcoded dark (#171717) in CSS

items.title: Star Rating Cascade
items.description: Five gold stars fill left-to-right in a staggered cascade with squash-pop scaling and sparkle flicks off each tip, then drain in reverse and repeat.
items.useWhen: Rating confirmations, review submission feedback, onboarding success moments on dark backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark amber). Interactive rating pickers — this is display-only; click only restarts the loop.
items.agentPrompt: Change star count to 3, increase STAGGER to 18 for a slower cascade, and set GOLD to '#FF6B6B' for a red-heart rating variant.
editableAreas: star count (stars array length + loop bounds)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded dark amber — must edit BG and CSS background to change
Click resets the cascade but does not support interactive per-star selection
No reduced-motion fallback animation — shows static filled state only

items.title: Search Bar Morph
items.description: A pill-shaped magnifier icon elastically expands into a full search bar, types a query with a blinking caret, then collapses back — looping automatically.
items.useWhen: App headers, search entry points, or onboarding flows where you want to demonstrate search affordance without requiring user input.
items.avoidWhen: Functional search forms where the bar must be interactive — this is a demo loop; wire click handlers and disable the auto-cycle for production use.
items.agentPrompt: Change the typed query to 'find your next idea', set the accent color to #8B5CF6 by replacing #0EA5E9 everywhere, and slow the open phase to 1100ms by setting its dur to 1100.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard with static fallback render()
knownLimitations: SVG handle length does not actually elongate on open — len is constant (lerp of identical values), so the handle stub stays the same size regardless of open state
Auto-cycles by default; click only resets to the open phase, not a true interactive toggle

items.title: Stepper Quantity Bump
items.description: Lime-green digit stepper with skeuomorphic ± keys; pressing rolls the number up or down with a spring overshoot and per-digit motion blur.
items.useWhen: Cart quantity selectors, seat pickers, or any numeric input needing satisfying tactile feedback.
items.avoidWhen: Large numeric ranges (only shows single digit 0–9 wrap); contexts where the auto-cycle demo loop would be distracting.
items.agentPrompt: Change the accent color from lime (#A3E635) to cyan (#22D3EE) and slow the roll animation to 700ms by editing the `dur` value in the `anim` object inside `trigger()`.
knownLimitations: Only displays the last digit (0–9 mod 10) — wraps silently for values ≥ 10
Auto-cycle loop runs by default; remove the autoT block before shipping in production
Buttons are divs without role=button — add ARIA roles for accessibility

items.title: Battery Charge Fill
items.description: Battery cycles amber-to-mint as a wobbling liquid level rises; segment ticks light in sequence, bubbles rise inside, and a bolt pulses at center.
items.useWhen: Status indicators for charging progress, IoT dashboards, energy/health app hero widgets.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts where a real battery percentage must be displayed — the charge is animated/simulated, not data-driven.
items.agentPrompt: Change palette to red/orange by updating AMBER=[239,68,68], LIME=[234,179,8], MINT=[251,191,36], and increase TICKS to 8.
knownLimitations: Charge is purely animated (sine cycle) — no API to bind a real percentage
Bubble positions are deterministic seed-based, not truly random

items.title: Inverted Reading Glass
items.description: A white circular lens tracks the cursor using mix-blend-mode:difference, inverting text colors beneath it to reveal near-invisible dark text on black.
items.useWhen: Hero sections with hidden or low-contrast text that rewards exploration. Interactive art installations or editorial reveals.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text at all times — text is nearly invisible without the lens. Touch-only devices get limited experience (auto-orbit fallback is narrow).
items.agentPrompt: Change the lens size from clamp(150px, 20vw, 250px) to clamp(80px, 12vw, 140px) and set the lerp factor from 0.15 to 0.08 for a heavier lag effect.
knownLimitations: Text is nearly invisible without interaction — not accessible as standalone content
Reduced-motion mode freezes lens at center with no fallback reveal
Auto-orbit loop runs a second rAF loop alongside animate() — two concurrent rAF chains

items.title: Orbiting Planet System
items.description: Four glowing planets orbit a radiant sun on tilted elliptical rings with depth-sorted rendering; the system drifts subtly toward the pointer.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero sections, space/sci-fi themed backgrounds, ambient screensaver panels needing gentle planetary motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark navy). Contexts requiring legible text overlays — glow effects compete with copy.
items.agentPrompt: Add a fifth planet at r:230, s:0.18, sz:5, c:'#80ffb0' and slow the base speed from t+=0.012 to t+=0.007.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit to change from dark navy
Reduced-motion draws a single static frame then stops — planets appear frozen rather than removed

items.title: Black-hole Accretion Swirl
items.description: 110 heat-colored particles spiral inward across a tilted accretion disk toward a glowing event horizon; pointer movement boosts swirl speed.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/sci-fi themes, ambient loading screens where high-motion drama is appropriate.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded near-black). Contexts where content must be read over the animation — particles are constant and distracting.
items.agentPrompt: Change particle count from N=110 to 160, shift heat colors to cool blue-white (replace '#ff5e2e' with '#4488ff', '#ffae4d' with '#aaddff', '#fff1c4' with '#ffffff'), and increase boost decay from 0.94 to 0.97 for longer pointer response.
editableAreas: event horizon radius (30*scale inner, 21*scale solid core)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#05040a) — must edit to use on non-dark backgrounds
No reduced-motion fallback beyond a static frame — animation fully stops rather than showing a gentle alternative
Particle reset from r<26 to r=180 can cause brief visual pop

items.title: Twinkling Starfield
items.description: 115 multicolor stars twinkle via sine waves; sparkle crosses appear on larger stars; stars brighten near cursor. Static fallback for reduced-motion.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/night themes, ambient looping screensavers.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark navy). Content-heavy layouts where motion competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Increase star count to 200, change palette to warm amber/orange tones, add a slow drift so stars move across the canvas.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit to change from dark navy

items.title: Spiral Galaxy Rotate
items.description: 115 stars form a two-armed spiral galaxy rotating around a violet radial-gradient core; pointer move briefly doubles spin speed.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space or sci-fi themes, ambient screensaver loops.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark fill). Layouts where constant rotation competes with readable content.
items.agentPrompt: Increase star count to 200, change arm count to 3, and shift the outer star color from #9ab8ff to #ffe066.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas fill — must change both to retheme
Reduced-motion path still renders one frame but does not fully stop animation loop

items.title: Comet Streak Loop
items.description: Cyan and violet comets with glowing heads and gradient tails streak diagonally across a twinkling dark starfield; click spawns an extra comet (up to 5).
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/sci-fi themes, ambient looping screensavers, loading screens.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded #030a14). Content-heavy layouts where diagonal motion competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change comet colors to warm gold and orange by replacing the hue array values '#7fe8ff' and '#c9b6ff' with '#ffe066' and '#ff9a3c', and increase comet speed by raising sp from 0.0045 to 0.008.
editableAreas: star count and twinkle speed (60 stars, t*0.02)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#030a14) — must edit to change dark navy
Reduced-motion mode renders one static frame only — comets are frozen, not removed
Click spawns comets but they auto-respawn on exit anyway, making click feel optional

items.title: Ringed Planet Rotate
items.description: Amber gas giant with tilted Saturn-like rings slowly rotates over a twinkling starfield; pointermove adjusts ring tilt and light angle dynamically.
items.useWhen: Space/sci-fi hero backgrounds, ambient screensavers, dark-mode landing sections needing slow cosmic motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark canvas). Contexts needing legible text overlays — planet occupies center stage.
items.agentPrompt: Change the planet palette to icy blue by replacing bands array with ['#7ec8e3','#5ba8c4','#a8dff0','#3d8fa8','#b0e0f5'] and update the radial gradient stops to match.
editableAreas: ring segment radii and opacity (segs array)
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (reduce flag stops rot increment)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0a0710) — must edit to change from dark purple-black
Ring tilt resets to default 0.4 only on reload; no mouse-leave reset
reduce flag freezes rotation but still runs rAF loop drawing a single static frame repeatedly

items.title: Constellation Connect
items.description: 46 drifting star nodes auto-connect with faint blue lines when close; cursor draws lines to nearby stars and brightens them on hover.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/night themes, data-network metaphors, ambient looping screensavers.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Contexts needing legible text overlays — lines and motion compete with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change node count from N=46 to 80, widen the connection threshold from LINK=0.2 to 0.28, and shift line color from rgba(140,180,255) to rgba(180,140,255) for a purple palette.
knownLimitations: O(N²) proximity check — node counts above ~120 will strain low-end CPUs
Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit to change from dark navy
Cursor lines disappear on touch devices (no persistent pointer position)

items.title: Hyperspace Warp
items.description: 110 star streaks radiate outward from a glowing center in a hyperspace tunnel effect; pressing and holding the canvas accelerates warp speed 2.6x.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, sci-fi or space-themed UIs, loading screens, or any ambient loop needing dramatic motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy), content-heavy layouts where motion competes with reading, or low-end devices sensitive to continuous canvas rendering.
items.agentPrompt: Change star count to 180 by setting N=180, shift color palette to warm gold/orange (replace '#9fdcff' with '#ffd580' and '#ffd1f0' with '#ff9a5c'), and increase warp acceleration target to 4.0.
editableAreas: streak trail opacity (0.34 in fillRect alpha)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#02030a) — must edit separately to change
Reduced-motion path still calls one frame() which runs the rAF loop — stars freeze only because z is not incremented, but the loop keeps running

items.title: Drifting Nebula
items.description: 26 soft radial blobs in pink, violet, and blue drift with additive blending over 70 twinkling stars; cursor gently pulls the nebula clouds.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space or sci-fi themes, ambient looping screensavers where gentle motion sets atmosphere.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark purple). Content-heavy layouts where text legibility matters.
items.agentPrompt: Change the color palette to cool teal/green tones by replacing cols with ['90,255,200','60,200,180','100,255,150','40,180,220'], and increase blob count N from 26 to 36 for a denser nebula.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (t freezes, blobs stop moving)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas fill — must change both to alter base color
Reduced-motion mode renders one static frame only; stars still twinkle since t still advances in that single frame

items.title: Solar Flare Pulse
items.description: Animated sun with pulsing radial corona, 60 radiating flare spikes, and 5 arcing prominences; clicking triggers a brighter solar burst.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/sci-fi themes, loading screens, ambient displays needing organic high-energy motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark background). Contexts where overlaid text must be readable — flare motion competes with copy.
items.agentPrompt: Change the sun color palette to a blue-white star: set sg stops to '#ffffff', '#a0c8ff', '#3366ff', and shift corona colors to rgba(100,160,255,...) tones.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS (#1a0703) and canvas fillRect — must change both to retheme
No reduced-motion fallback beyond a single static frame — animation fully stops rather than showing subtle version

items.title: Logarithmic Zoom Journey
items.description: Nested labeled rings dilate outward from a glowing core through 10 cosmic scales (atom to cosmic web); pointer and click accelerate the zoom drift.
items.useWhen: Space-themed hero backgrounds, science/data viz intros, ambient screensaver-style displays needing infinite-zoom metaphor.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark navy). Contexts where label text competes with page content.
items.agentPrompt: Change RUNGS labels and colors to geological timescales, set GAP to 2.0 to widen ring spacing, and increase baseR from U*0.052 to U*0.065.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas fillRect — must change both to alter background
Reduced-motion fallback is a single static frame, not a fully static layout
ringAt() helper function is defined but unused — actual radius computed inline

items.title: Light Travel Delay
items.description: Amber wavefronts expand from a star, lighting up distance markers (1 AU, 1 ly, 100 ly) as each ring arrives. Click fires a manual pulse.
items.useWhen: Science/educational hero sections, space-themed dashboards, ambient dark-mode backgrounds where slow deliberate motion is wanted.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark purple-black). Contexts needing fast visual feedback — motion is intentionally slow and sparse.
items.agentPrompt: Change wavefront color to cyan by replacing all 'rgba(255,179,71' with 'rgba(0,234,255', and increase SP from 0.40 to 0.60 to speed up light travel.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must edit #0a0612 to change theme
Reduced-motion shows a single static frame, no interactivity
Marker labels may overlap on very small viewports

items.title: Parallax Depth Drift
items.description: Four-layer parallax starfield drifts laterally; near stars streak with motion-blur while the deep field barely moves. Pointer nudges the drift direction.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/sci-fi themes, ambient looping screensavers needing genuine depth.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark navy). Content-heavy layouts where continuous lateral drift competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change the foreground streaker count from 16 to 24 by editing LAYERS[3].n, and shift the color to electric blue by setting LAYERS[3].col to '100,180,255'.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas fill — must change both to retheme
Streak direction is always left-to-right regardless of drift direction
No touch-based nudge — pointer nudge only fires on pointermove, not device orientation

items.title: Pulsar Lighthouse Sweep
items.description: A neutron star spins twin teal lighthouse beams that sweep and blip brighter when crossing the line of sight; dipole field lines and starfield pulse in sync.
items.useWhen: Dark sci-fi hero backgrounds, space/astronomy themes, ambient screensaver-style tiles where metronomic rhythm adds atmosphere.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark navy). Contexts where flashing blips may distract from foreground content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the spin period to 1.2 seconds by setting PERIOD=1.2, shift beam color to magenta by replacing rgba(94,255,196,...) with rgba(255,80,200,...), and increase star count from 90 to 150.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#040810) — must edit both CSS and fillRect call to change
Pointer and click only add speed nudge, not directional control
No aria labeling on canvas

items.title: Gravitational Lens Ring
items.description: Stars and galaxy arcs bend tangentially around a dark mass; alignment drifts to form a glowing magenta Einstein ring. Pointer shifts alignment offset.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, science/space themes, ambient screensavers where a dramatic but calm cosmic effect is needed.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark purple), contexts needing legible text over the center, or low-end devices where canvas arc loops may stutter.
items.agentPrompt: Change the Einstein ring color from magenta to electric blue by replacing all 'rgba(255,158,210' values with 'rgba(0,180,255', and slow drift by changing t*0.011 to t*0.006.
editableAreas: source galaxy point count (70 in loop)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and fillRect — must change both to retheme
No meaningful reduced-motion fallback beyond one static frame
Pointer nudge decay is frame-rate dependent (nudge*=0.95 per frame)

items.title: Aurora Curtain Flow
items.description: 7 green and magenta aurora curtains ripple above a dark planetary limb; pointer nudges the bands sideways, click jolts them.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, space/sci-fi themes, ambient screensaver displays, atmospheric loading states.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark theme). Content-heavy layouts where constant motion competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change front curtain color to electric blue by replacing colA=[61,255,160] with colA=[0,180,255] and colB=[120,255,210] with colB=[80,220,255] in drawCurtain.
editableAreas: front curtain color (colA/colB arrays in drawCurtain)
knownLimitations: Background and planetary limb colors are hardcoded — requires CSS and canvas edits to retheme
No aria role on canvas element
Click jolt decays quickly via nudge*=0.95 per frame

items.title: Protostar Accretion Disk
items.description: 160 dust grains spiral inward along two logarithmic arms toward a glowing protostar; bipolar jets pulse up and down with warm-to-cool color grading.
items.useWhen: Dark-theme hero backgrounds, space/astronomy content, ambient screensaver-style displays needing a dramatic focal point.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark background). Contexts where constant particle motion competes with overlaid text or UI.
items.agentPrompt: Change grain count from N=160 to N=250, set TILT to 0.2 for a more edge-on disk, and shift the core color from warm white '#fff8ec' to electric blue '#a0d8ff'.
editableAreas: color palette in col() function by radius bands
knownLimitations: 160-particle loop with per-frame alpha blending is CPU-bound on low-end devices
Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0e0805) — must edit to change dark theme
No reduced-motion fallback beyond a single static dark frame

items.title: Tidal Spaghettification
items.description: 170 particles arc past a gravity well, stretching into a white-hot filament at perihelion. Pointer and click boost the tidal spread effect.
items.useWhen: Dark space or sci-fi hero backgrounds, physics visualizations, ambient loading screens with dramatic motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark purple-black). Layouts where high-motion visuals compete with primary content.
items.agentPrompt: Change particle count N from 170 to 220, shift the color ramp to cyan/blue (replace #fff0e6, #ffb3a0, #ff6b6b, #8a3a6a with #e6f8ff, #a0d4ff, #6b9eff, #3a5a8a), and slow flow by reducing t+=0.0042 to t+=0.002.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard with static fallback frame
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0a0510) — must change both CSS and canvas fillStyle to retheme
Gravity well position fixed relative to center — may clip on very wide or narrow viewports

items.title: Exoplanet Transit Dip
items.description: A planet transits a limb-darkened star; a live light-curve panel plots the real-time flux dip. Click resets transit; pointermove nudges speed.
items.useWhen: Science or education dashboards, space-themed hero backgrounds, ambient data visualization displays.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring fast interaction — slow ambient simulation. Avoid on low-end mobile where continuous canvas redraws may drain battery.
items.agentPrompt: Change the planet-to-star ratio to 0.30 by setting k=0.30 in planetRatio(), and shift the impact parameter b from 0.32 to 0.0 for a dead-center transit.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard with static pre-filled frame
knownLimitations: Light curve y-axis scales to current planet ratio — changing k without checking yFor() scale may compress the dip visually
No aria labels or role on canvas

items.title: Cosmic Microwave Static
items.description: Multi-octave Perlin noise renders a mottled hot-red/cold-blue CMB field with vignette. Pointer nudges a dipole anisotropy across the temperature map.
items.useWhen: Dark-theme hero backgrounds, space/science visualizations, ambient generative art displays.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark canvas). Low-end mobile where per-frame pixel loop may drop frames.
items.agentPrompt: Change CELL from 7 to 4 for sharper grain, shift hot color to gold by setting r=24+(200*a), g=14+(160*a), b=26+(20*a) in the pixel loop.
editableAreas: cold/hot color channels in pixel loop
preserveElements: low-res offscreen canvas upscale pattern (critical for perf)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded (#060409) — must edit CSS and vignette color stop together
No aria labeling on canvas
warm glow lingers ~20 frames after cursor leaves due to warm*=0.95 decay

items.title: Magnetic Button
items.description: Dark pill button drifts in an idle orbital float; cursor proximity pulls it magnetically with a label inner-parallax and iris-to-cyan glow on hover.
items.useWhen: CTA buttons on dark hero sections or landing pages where tactile interactivity signals quality.
items.avoidWhen: Dense form layouts or light backgrounds — glow and drift assume a dark surface and open space around the button.
items.agentPrompt: Change the idle drift amplitude from 14/9 to 6/4 for a subtler float, and set accent color to #ff6b6b by replacing #7c5cff throughout.
knownLimitations: CSS transition on transform fights the rAF loop when exiting hover — works fine visually but two systems control transform simultaneously
Magnetic effect applies only within the button bounding box, not a wider attraction radius

items.title: Gooey Liquid Toggle
items.description: Pill toggle where an SVG goo-filtered blob stretches and merges as it slides from off to on, shifting grey to iris purple. Auto-cycles as demo.
items.useWhen: Settings pages, dark-mode switches, any boolean UI control that benefits from tactile, liquid feel.
items.avoidWhen: Forms requiring immediate user control — remove the auto-cycle loop and wire state management before shipping in production.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent color to emerald (#22c55e), slow the toggle travel by setting --dur-base to 420ms, and increase the drop trail offset from 20 to 32.
knownLimitations: Auto-cycles by default — remove loop() call before shipping in production
Drop blob r reset relies on a 200ms setTimeout which can desync if toggled rapidly

items.title: Morphing Action FAB
items.description: Gradient FAB whose plus icon rotates 135° to an X on click, fanning six icon buttons outward in a staggered radial spring animation. Auto-cycles in demo mode.
items.useWhen: Mobile-style action menus, dashboard toolbars, or any context needing quick access to 4–6 secondary actions from a single trigger button.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts where the FAB overlaps critical content. Remove the auto-cycle loop before shipping in production — it fires every ~2.6 s regardless of user intent.
items.agentPrompt: Change the gradient from iris-cyan to amber-rose by updating --grad-iris-cyan to linear-gradient(120deg,#f97316,#e11d48), and increase the radial spread radius from 64px/55px to 80px/68px.
editableAreas: radial spread distances (64px / 55px in nth-child transforms)
knownLimitations: Auto-cycles by default — call stop() and remove the loop bootstrap before production use
Six items at 64px/55px spread; adding more items requires manually computing new translate() positions
tabindex='-1' on items means keyboard nav is absent when closed — Escape closes but Arrow keys not wired

items.title: Material Ripple
items.description: Dark rounded button that spawns an expanding ink ripple from the tap point; idles by firing ripples from random positions every 1.5 s.
items.useWhen: CTA buttons, action triggers, any click surface needing tactile feedback with a material-design feel.
items.avoidWhen: Auto-cycling demo ripple must be removed before production use; not suitable where motion is distracting or backgrounds are light.
items.agentPrompt: Change the ripple color from purple/cyan to gold by editing the radial-gradient in .c04-rip__ink background to rgba(255,180,0,0.55), rgba(255,220,80,0.15), and slow the spread to 800ms via --dur-slow.
preserveElements: reduced-motion guard (animation-duration:.001ms + early return in loop)
knownLimitations: Auto-cycling idle loop must be removed or stopped before shipping in production
Ripple color is hardcoded in CSS — not a CSS variable, requires two-place edit

items.title: Neon Glow Pulse
items.description: Cyan pill button on near-black that breathes a bright neon bloom via opacity pulse on a pseudo-element; hover shifts background and text color.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode CTAs, sci-fi or cyberpunk UI, hero sections needing an ambient glowing button with no JS overhead.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (background is hardcoded near-black). Contexts where constant glow motion would compete with dense content.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent to hot pink by setting --accent-cyan to #f0abfc, update border and text-shadow color references to match, and slow the pulse to 3600ms by editing --dur-loop.
preserveElements: ::before pseudo-element bloom layer (opacity-only animation for perf)
knownLimitations: Background color and radial gradient are hardcoded — must edit CSS to use on any other background
Button has no aria-label; label text 'Activate' is visible but a real action should be wired to click

items.title: Jelly Press
items.description: Aurora-gradient button squashes and stretches with a spring keyframe animation on click; auto-cycles idle squish every 2.1s to stay alive at rest.
items.useWhen: CTA buttons, interactive demos, any UI needing tactile press feedback with lively personality.
items.avoidWhen: Forms where animation distracts from input focus; remove the idle auto-cycle loop before shipping in production.
items.agentPrompt: Change the button label to 'Get Started', swap the gradient to linear-gradient(135deg,#00c6ff,#0072ff), and slow the squish duration to 0.7s.
preserveElements: void btn.offsetWidth restart trick (forces animation restart)
knownLimitations: Auto-cycles idle squish by default — remove loop() call before production use
Gradient is CSS background so no direct text contrast check; dark text (#0b0c12) may fail on pale gradient ends

items.title: Stroke-Draw Outline
items.description: Ghost button whose rounded-rect SVG border self-draws via stroke-dashoffset on hover; an idle loop auto-cycles draw/erase every ~2s.
items.useWhen: CTAs on dark backgrounds, hero section buttons, any ghost-style button needing tactile hover feedback without heavy motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (bg hardcoded dark). Forms requiring instant-visible borders — the outline starts hidden by default.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent to teal (#00d4aa), slow the draw to 1.4s (transition-duration on .c07-draw__rect), and update idle hold time from 2200 to 3500ms.
knownLimitations: stroke-dasharray=480 is hardcoded — must recalculate if button size changes significantly
Auto-cycles by default; remove setTimeout loop before shipping in production
Background hardcoded dark — not drop-in on light themes

items.title: Sliding Fill
items.description: Outlined button where an iris-to-cyan gradient sweeps in from the left on hover, filling the button and flipping text dark. Auto-cycles as idle demo.
items.useWhen: CTA buttons, hero sections, or any action button needing tactile hover feedback with strong color contrast.
items.avoidWhen: Auto-cycle demo mode ships as-is — remove the setTimeout loop before production use. Avoid on light backgrounds without color adjustments.
items.agentPrompt: Change the gradient to a rose-to-orange sweep by setting --grad-iris-cyan to linear-gradient(120deg,#f43f5e,#fb923c), and slow the fill transition by changing --dur-slow to 800ms.
knownLimitations: Auto-cycles by default — remove the loop() / setTimeout for production
Background hardcoded dark (#08090d) — adjust body background for light themes

items.title: Confetti Burst
items.description: Magenta pill button fires 26 colorful confetti squares and circles in a physics arc on click; auto-bursts every 2.3 s as an idle demo loop.
items.useWhen: CTA buttons, success states, celebration moments, onboarding rewards where a burst of delight reinforces the action.
items.avoidWhen: Passive display contexts or forms requiring focus — delete the auto-loop timer before shipping to production.
items.agentPrompt: Change particle count to 40, swap colors to ["#facc15","#fb923c","#f43f5e","#ffffff"], and slow the idle interval to 4000ms.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion count reduction and duration skip
knownLimitations: Auto-cycles by default — remove loop() call before production use
Particles are appended inside the button element, so large counts can briefly bloat the DOM
No aria-live announcement for the burst event

items.title: 3D Push Button
items.description: Iris-to-cyan gradient button with a layered edge and drop shadow that depresses on press and springs back, mimicking a physical key. Auto-cycles as demo.
items.useWhen: CTAs, form submit buttons, or any action trigger that benefits from tactile physical feedback.
items.avoidWhen: Passive display contexts — remove the auto-cycle setTimeout loop before shipping in production.
items.agentPrompt: Change the button label to 'Subscribe', update the gradient to linear-gradient(120deg,#f97316,#ec4899), and increase the idle press interval from 1800ms to 3000ms.
knownLimitations: Auto-cycles by default — remove setTimeout loop for production use
Edge color is a static dark purple and must be updated manually if gradient changes

items.title: Thanos Snap Delete
items.description: Red DELETE button that disintegrates into ~200 drifting dust particles on click. Particles drift right and fade; a Restore link resets the state.
items.useWhen: Destructive action confirmations (delete, remove, clear) where dramatic feedback reinforces irreversibility. Fun product demos or portfolio pieces.
items.avoidWhen: Frequent-action buttons or flows where users repeat the action often — the animation has no auto-reset. Avoid in low-motion contexts where reduced-motion is common.
items.agentPrompt: Change the button label from 'DELETE' to 'ERASE', set particle colors to '#00eaff' and '#0080ff', and increase the grid to 30 cols and 15 rows for denser dust.
knownLimitations: No visibility-change pause — particles keep animating if tab is hidden during snap
Particle positions are DOM-absolute, so resizing mid-snap causes misalignment
Restore button lacks aria attributes for screen readers

items.title: 3D Tilt Parallax
items.description: Dark card tilts in 3D toward the cursor; badge, orb, and text layers float at distinct Z-depths. A radial shine tracks the pointer; auto-rotates when idle.
items.useWhen: Product cards, profile cards, hero feature panels — anywhere a premium tactile feel rewards hover interaction.
items.avoidWhen: Touch-only mobile UIs where pointermove is absent; content-dense layouts where 3D tilt distracts from surrounding text.
items.agentPrompt: Change the accent color to gold (#f59e0b), increase the max tilt angle from 14 to 20 degrees, and set the orb color to match the accent.
preserveElements: c01-tilt--live class for fast transition on hover
knownLimitations: Shine effect uses CSS custom properties — requires modern browser; no fallback for IE/older Safari
Card size is vmin-based so may appear small on landscape mobile viewports

items.title: Frosted Glass
items.description: A frosted glass card floats over three slowly drifting color blobs (iris, cyan, magenta); the panel lifts slightly on hover.
items.useWhen: Dark-themed hero sections, feature highlight cards, pricing panels, or any UI needing a premium glassmorphism aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (background is hardcoded dark). Browsers without backdrop-filter support — the blur will silently degrade to a semi-opaque panel.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent blobs to purple/gold/teal by updating --accent-iris, --accent-cyan, and --accent-magenta, then slow drift speed by changing the 9s duration to 14s on .c02-glass__blob.
knownLimitations: backdrop-filter unsupported in Firefox without a flag — panel falls back to semi-opaque but blur vanishes
Background color hardcoded dark — card reads poorly on light pages

items.title: Flip Card
items.description: Card rotates 180 degrees in 3D on hover or focus to reveal a magenta-gradient back face; auto-cycles every 2.6s as a demo loop.
items.useWhen: Product cards, portfolio pieces, or any UI element that needs a front/back reveal pattern with polished 3D feel.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts where hover is unavailable (touch-only) — the auto-cycle helps but flipping is not touch-triggered by default.

editableAreas: front face title and subtitle text
knownLimitations: Touch devices get no hover trigger — auto-cycle is the only demo motion on mobile
Auto-cycles by default; remove setTimeout(tick) call before shipping in production

items.title: Spotlight Hover
items.description: Dark card with an iris radial glow and a CSS-masked grid that both track the cursor; auto-orbits when the pointer is away.

items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark) or touch-only devices where pointermove never fires.

rect cache + resize refresh pattern (avoids per-frame reflow)
knownLimitations: Grid and glow are pure CSS — no canvas, so spotlight edge is always a smooth gradient with no noise/texture
Card size uses vmin units; very small viewports may clip content before max-width clamps

items.title: Gradient-Border Glow

items.title: Expanding Accordion

items.title: Reveal on Hover

items.title: Stacked Peeking Cards

items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible card content — the fanned back cards are partially obscured. Avoid when auto-cycle motion conflicts with focused reading layouts.

items.title: Holographic Foil Card
items.description: A dark card tilts in 3D up to 20deg as the pointer moves over it; rainbow foil gradient and radial glare shift with cursor position via CSS custom properties.
items.useWhen: Product cards, trading-card showcases, NFT or collectible displays, hero feature cards needing tactile depth.

items.title: Orbital Dots

items.title: Morphing Blob

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded dark — must edit CSS vars to use on light themes

items.title: Liquid Fill

items.title: DNA Helix

aria-label on helix + aria-live on status
knownLimitations: Node positions calculated once on load — resize does not reflow node layout

items.title: Skeleton Shimmer
items.description: Dark content-placeholder card with avatar circle and staggered text bars swept by a looping iris-to-cyan shimmer gradient. Pure CSS, no JS logic.

items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs — background is hardcoded dark navy. Avoid when reduced-motion users need a fully static placeholder; animation still runs one iteration before stopping.

items.title: Particle Orbit
items.description: 18 glowing iris, cyan, and magenta particles orbit a white core on wobbling elliptical paths; trailing fill creates a comet-like motion blur effect.

items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark fill). Contexts where spinner must stop on completion — no external stop API exposed.

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas fill — must edit both to change
No external API to stop/start the spinner programmatically from outside the IIFE
Reduced-motion renders one static frame only — no accessible text alternative

items.title: Concentric Pulse
items.description: Four concentric rings ripple outward in staggered cyan, iris, and magenta waves from a beating gradient core dot on a dark background.

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — requires edit to use on light backgrounds

items.title: Equalizer Bars

items.useWhen: Music apps, audio players, loading states, or any context where an audio/media metaphor fits the brand.
items.avoidWhen: Static content pages or contexts where looping motion distracts from primary content; reduced-motion users get a near-static fallback only.

Bar heights are hardcoded per nth-child — adding/removing bars requires manual height assignment

items.title: Conic Progress
items.description: A circular conic-gradient ring fills from 0–100% with an iris arc and a blurred cyan glow layer; a live numeric counter updates in sync.

items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing multiple simultaneous progress rings; the hardcoded dark background makes it unsuitable for light-mode UIs.

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to dark navy — must edit CSS vars to use in light-mode layouts
CSS transition on conic-gradient (background) is not hardware-accelerated — avoid on very low-end devices

items.title: Typewriter Loader
items.description: Terminal card with traffic-light dots cycles through status phrases typing and erasing character-by-character after a $ prompt with a blinking iris caret.
items.useWhen: Loading screens, build/compile progress indicators, developer-tool or CLI-themed UIs needing ambient status text.
items.avoidWhen: Non-technical or consumer-facing contexts where terminal aesthetics feel out of place. Avoid when progress must map to real state.

knownLimitations: Purely decorative — not wired to real async state; remove loop and drive fi/ci externally for production use
Card width capped at 260px; long phrases may wrap unexpectedly

items.title: Fluid Metaballs

items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (background hardcoded). Performance-sensitive mobile — SVG feGaussianBlur filter is GPU-intensive.

travel distance (38px in translateX/Y keyframe values)

preserveElements: SVG filter #c11-filter — the feColorMatrix gooey effect; removing it turns blobs into plain circles
c11- namespace prefix on all classes
knownLimitations: SVG feGaussianBlur filter can be GPU-intensive on low-end or older devices
Background color hardcoded in CSS body — must override to use on light themes

items.title: Boiling Coffee Pot
items.description: SVG coffee machine: liquid fills and drains in an 8s cycle, a drip falls from the spout, and two steam wisps animate on curved paths above.
items.useWhen: Startup or loading screens needing warmth and playfulness. Coffee apps, productivity tools, or anywhere a narrative loader fits the brand.
items.avoidWhen: Minimalist or corporate contexts. Requires solid SVG rendering — avoid targeting IE or very old browsers.
items.agentPrompt: Change accent to teal by replacing #ff5ca8 on .c13-machine stroke and #22d3ee on .c13-drip/.c13-liquid fill. Speed up the drip by reducing 1.6s on c13-dripping. Make the fill cycle faster by reducing 8s on c13-fill-up.
editableAreas: drip and liquid fill color (#22d3ee on .c13-drip and .c13-liquid)
fill cycle duration (8s on c13-fill-up keyframe)
