items.description: Childlike pictographs — fish, moon, arrow, face, tree, star, boat — drawn stroke-by-stroke on warm paper, held, then erased and reseeded in a cycling grid.
items.useWhen: Ambient backgrounds with an artsy or illustrative tone. Gallery headers, creative portfolio pages, or Paul Klee-inspired UI themes.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing static or text-heavy layouts — glyphs cycle continuously and compete for attention.
items.agentPrompt: Add a new glyph called 'cross' to the GLYPHS object with strokes [[-1,0],[1,0]] and [[0,-1],[0,1]], then include 'cross' in the NAMES array.
editableAreas: grid cell size (120 divisor in seed())
knownLimitations: Glyph coordinates are hand-authored unit-space paths — adding new shapes requires careful coordinate design
Grid recalculates on resize with 150ms debounce; rapid resizing may briefly show stale layout
No touch/pointer interactivity — fully passive

items.title: Polyphony Grid
items.description: A 16x6 color grid swept by a column playhead; active cells flash with scale and glow on each pass, voices re-seeded each lap for evolving compositions.
items.useWhen: Ambient creative backgrounds, music/audio visualization metaphors, or Paul Klee-inspired art installations.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring static or minimal motion — the constant sweeping playhead is always active. Not suitable as a functional audio sequencer without additional wiring.
items.agentPrompt: Change COLS to 24 and ROWS to 8, set playhead speed by changing the dt*COLS*0.9 multiplier to 1.4, and add a sixth palette color PAL.cobalt='#2a4a8c'.
knownLimitations: CSS grid cell count fixed at build time — changing COLS/ROWS requires matching gridTemplateColumns/Rows updates
No touch or pointer interactivity; purely passive
Re-seeding is random, not musical — no scale or rhythm logic

items.title: Twittering Contraption
items.description: Four Klee-style wire birds bob on a horizontal wire and chirp musical notes while a hand-crank below spins. Inspired by Paul Klee's 1922 painting.
items.useWhen: Art/creative portfolio backgrounds, generative-art showcases, ambient decorative tiles with a whimsical mechanical theme.
items.avoidWhen: Light-theme UIs — background is hardcoded dark #23201b and won't adapt. Contexts needing interactivity.
items.agentPrompt: Increase bird count to 6 by changing N=4 to N=6, and slow the crank rotation from 4s to 8s in the kle06-spin animation.
preserveElements: aria-label on scene div for accessibility
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to dark #23201b — must edit CSS to change
Bird positions are evenly spaced by formula; uneven layouts require manual overrides

items.title: Colour Staircase
items.description: 9 color-graduated bars ascend like a staircase, each breathing in height and marching hue in staggered CSS keyframe loops. Warm parchment background.
items.useWhen: Art-themed dashboards, Paul Klee or Bauhaus visual contexts, ambient looping backgrounds with a structured color palette feel.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — the rising bars occupy full height. Avoid when a static, non-animated background is needed.
items.agentPrompt: Change the ribbon palette to cool blues by replacing ribbon with ['#1a3a5c','#2a5f8f','#3a8fc4','#6ab8d4','#a0d8ef'], and increase step count N from 9 to 12.
knownLimitations: Heights are CSS custom properties set via JS — changing N requires recalculating base height range manually
Staggered negative animation-delay means first few bars start mid-cycle on load

items.title: Geometric Face
items.description: Abstract Klee-style face built from interlocking color planes that slowly cross-fade hues; eyes blink and mouth curves shift expression in a gentle loop.
items.useWhen: Art/museum contexts, generative portrait hero sections, dark-background ambient displays inspired by early modernism.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark canvas fill). Contexts where constant subtle motion is distracting alongside dense content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette's accent from terra (#c96f4a) to crimson (#b53030) and slow the region color transitions by setting speed to 0.06+Math.random()*0.10.
editableAreas: PAL color palette object (all named colors)
knownLimitations: Background fill is hardcoded #23201b — must edit CSS and canvas fillRect to change
No click/hover interactivity; expression changes are purely time-driven

items.title: The Duality
items.description: Two concentric ring systems — rose and blue — slowly breathe apart and together; a golden vesica glows where they overlap, with a center dot marking the axis.
items.useWhen: Art-inspired hero backgrounds, meditative or spiritual UIs, gallery intros referencing Hilma af Klint or sacred geometry.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring legible content over the canvas — the breathing animation competes with text. Light-background designs need CSS override.
items.agentPrompt: Change the rose circle color to deep violet (#7c5cbf) by updating PAL.rose, and slow the breath cycle to 0.4 by changing the t*0.7 multiplier.
knownLimitations: Background color (#ece4d4) is set in CSS body, not canvas — must edit separately
No pointer or click interactivity — purely passive

items.title: Spiral of Becoming
items.description: Logarithmic spiral slowly rotates and breathes while pastel nodes pulse with radial glows along its arm — generative geometry in af Klint's theosophical idiom.
items.useWhen: Ambient hero backgrounds, spiritual or art-themed UIs, generative art galleries, loading screens needing calm motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs clashing with the warm linen (#ece4d4) background. Contexts requiring legible text over the center.
items.agentPrompt: Change PASTELS to warm earth tones (['#d4a96a','#c47c5a','#e8d4a0','#b07840','#d4b896']), slow rotation by setting rot=t*0.10, increase turns to 6.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#ece4d4) — must edit to change from warm linen
No pointer interactivity wired
Spiral growth breathing may feel slow before sine completes first cycle

items.title: Swan Duality
items.description: Two organic forms — cream and ink — orbit a shared center with wobbling silhouettes and a rose radial glow, evoking af Klint's Swan duality symbolism.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, art/culture sites, ambient screensaver loops with a painterly or spiritual aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark purple). Contexts with legible text overlays — constant motion competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Slow the orbit by changing `ang=t*0.3`, swap rose glow to gold by replacing `PAL.rose` with `'#d4a017'` in the radial gradient, and increase wobble depth from `0.16` to `0.26`.
editableAreas: wobble depth (0.16 and 0.09 in wob formula)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#1d1a24) — must edit to change from dark purple
No pointer interactivity — purely passive
Orbit path elliptical only; extreme aspect ratios may look off

items.title: Pendulum Diagram
items.description: A harmonograph rosette draws itself stroke by stroke in pastel hues, fades, then reseeds with new frequencies — evoking Hilma af Klint's automatic diagrams.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, generative art displays, meditative ambient loops with an esoteric or spiritual visual tone.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark #1d1a24 fill). Contexts needing user interaction or legible text overlays — the constant redraw competes with content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the pastel palette to warm earth tones by replacing PASTELS with ['#d4a96a','#c97b5a','#e8d5b0','#b87333','#9e6b4a'], and slow the draw cycle by changing PERIOD from 9 to 14.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and JS fill — must change both to use a non-dark background
Frequencies chosen randomly each cycle; no seed control, so output is non-deterministic

items.title: Atom Series
items.description: Three pastel atom diagrams — concentric rings, orbiting dots, center glyphs — connected by a faint triangle. After af Klint's atom studies.
items.useWhen: Neutral or warm hero backgrounds with a mystical or generative art theme. Ambient gallery or screensaver contexts.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring legible text overlaid on canvas — soft pastels provide little contrast. Not suitable as a UI widget.
items.agentPrompt: Change PASTELS[0] from '#a9c8e0' to '#ff9f80', increase satellite count (sat) to 8 per atom, and halve orbital speed by changing 0.5 to 0.25 in the sp formula.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#ece4d4) — must edit HTML to change
Atom positions are fixed proportional coordinates; no responsive reflow beyond scaling
Glyph type and satellite count randomized at build time — reload for different arrangements

items.title: The Series
items.description: Five SVG diagrams — spiral, nested ovals, petals, vesica piscis, concentric circles — cross-fade on a 3.4s loop with dot indicators, in pastel af Klint palette.
items.useWhen: Art-inspired ambient displays, gallery intros, spiritual/geometric theme backgrounds, or wherever a slow meditative loop fits.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring immediate user interaction; viewers sensitive to slow cross-fades on reduced-motion setups (loop halts entirely).
items.agentPrompt: Change the auto-advance interval from 3.4 to 5 seconds by editing the `autoT>3.4` threshold in the tick function, and swap the first palette color C[0] from '#a9c8e0' to '#b0d4c8'.
editableAreas: SVG shape parameters (spiral turns, oval counts, petal count N=8)
preserveElements: aria-label on stage for screen readers
knownLimitations: Auto-loop stops entirely under prefers-reduced-motion — no manual navigation fallback for those users
No touch/swipe or keyboard navigation between slides

items.title: Tree of Knowledge
items.description: Symmetric binary tree of pastel circles and inked branches grows upward via stroke-draw and pop-in animations, then redraws on a 9-second loop.
items.useWhen: Ambient hero backgrounds, spiritual/botanical themes, data-tree concepts, or any context evoking growth and symmetry.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring interactivity or user-driven state — tree is fully autonomous with no input hooks.
items.agentPrompt: Change PASTELS array to warm terracotta tones and slow the redraw interval from 9000 to 14000ms.
knownLimitations: Tree structure is fixed at compile time — no variation between redraw cycles
Redraw clears and rebuilds all SVG DOM nodes every 9s

items.title: The Altarpiece
items.description: 9 breathing pastel rings inside a clipped triangle; 26 motes drift upward as a pulsing light crowns the apex. Homage to af Klint's altarpieces.
items.useWhen: Spiritual or meditative hero sections, art/gallery contexts, dark ambient backgrounds needing slow celestial motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded dark #1d1a24). Contexts where upward particle drift distracts from primary content.
items.agentPrompt: Change PASTELS to warm sunset tones, slow breath by setting t*0.5 to t*0.25, and increase mote count from 26 to 40.
preserveElements: ctx.clip() triangle clipping (keeps motes inside triangle)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and PAL.deep — must edit both to change
No pointer interactivity — purely passive

items.title: Pulsing Dot Field
items.description: A lattice of red dots pulses in radius and alpha via staggered sine waves; bright dots flash yellow at peak. No user input required.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, loading screens, ambient loop displays needing a structured generative feel.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark fill). Contexts where constant pulsing motion competes with foreground content.
items.agentPrompt: Change dot color to cyan (#00eaff) and flash color to white (#ffffff), increase grid spacing from gap=30 to gap=40, slow the pulse by changing t+=dt to t+=dt*0.5.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fill — must change both to retheme
No pointer interactivity — dots do not react to cursor

items.title: Mirror Tunnel
items.description: 26 rings of colored dots recede toward a vanishing point, growing in size and radius as they rush toward the viewer — a looping mirrored tunnel illusion.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, loading screens, or ambient displays needing strong depth and motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background UIs (background hardcoded near-black). Contexts where text must be read over the animation.
items.agentPrompt: Change the color palette to cool blues/purples by replacing the cols array with ['#00d4ff','#7b2fff','#0090ff','#c8b8ff','#00ffcc'], and increase ring count by setting NR=36.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS (#060406) and canvas fillRect — must edit both
No pointer interactivity — purely passive

items.title: The Dotted Gourd
items.description: An orange ribbed gourd rendered on canvas with 110 dark dots scaled by curvature and depth; the whole form sways gently as if in a breeze.
items.useWhen: Ambient nature or harvest-themed backgrounds, seasonal landing pages, quirky generative art showcases.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring text overlays — the gourd occupies center canvas with no padding. Dark background is hardcoded.
items.agentPrompt: Change the gourd color to deep purple (#7b2fbe) and the dot fill to #1a0030, then slow the sway by setting the sin multiplier from 0.9 to 0.4.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0a0608) — must change both CSS and canvas fillStyle to retheme
Dot positions are random on load with no seed — layout differs each page load
No interaction — purely passive display

items.title: The Endless Net
items.description: A grid of scalloped double-arc loops drawn on deep red canvas, each cell pulsing in brightness on its own sine-wave phase, evoking woven netting.
items.useWhen: Dark-themed hero backgrounds, textile or pattern aesthetics, ambient looping decoration for brand with bold color.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded #9c0d20 red). Contexts where high cell count causes perf issues on very large screens.
items.agentPrompt: Change background to deep navy (#0d1a9c), loop color to rgba(180,220,255,...), and slow the pulse cycle by changing t*1.3 to t*0.7.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillStyle — must update both
Cell count scales with viewport; very large screens may render many arcs per frame
No pointer interactivity — purely passive

items.title: Dissolve
items.description: 115 colored dots orbit an empty center in a slow ellipse, periodically dissolving outward in a breathing scatter pattern with depth-based opacity.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode ambient backgrounds, screensaver-style hero sections, or any context needing gentle looping motion with a cosmic/particle aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark fill). Contexts requiring legible text overlays — dots occupy the center zone during reformation.
items.agentPrompt: Change the color palette to cool blues and teals by setting cols to ['#00eaff','#0080ff','#a0e0ff','#ffffff'], increase dot count N to 180, and slow the dissolve cycle by changing t*0.33 to t*0.18.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded as #060406 — must edit CSS and initial fillStyle to change
No pointer interactivity — purely passive

items.title: Mirrored Light Box
items.description: 12 nested glowing squares dive inward in a perpetual zoom loop while rotating; colored corner dots hue-rotate continuously over a deep dark stage.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, screensavers, or ambient loop visuals needing a hypnotic tunnel-of-light effect.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark stage), or contexts where constant motion competes with foreground content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to cool blues by replacing cols with ['#00cfff','#0077ff','#00ffcc','#ffffff','#3a86ff','#00b4d8'] and slow the spin to 40s in .dot06-rot.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (REDUCED check + animation:none media query)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and inline style — must change in two places
No visibilitychange listener — animation runs while tab is hidden
Corner dots clip at very small viewport sizes

items.title: Cadmium Gourd Stripes
items.description: Wavy cadmium-yellow and black bands undulate horizontally while 70 white and red dots drift upward through the field in a looping scroll.
items.useWhen: Dark ambient backgrounds, music/art visuals, retro-style hero sections needing high-contrast motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark near-black). Content requiring text legibility over the canvas.

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#0a0608) — must edit both CSS and canvas fill to change it
Dot positions are deterministic pseudo-random seeds, not truly random — pattern repeats identically each load

items.title: The Vanishing Room
items.description: Colorful dots bloom one by one over a minimal line-drawn room until it vanishes beneath them, then the cycle resets. Warm cream palette with bold accent colors.
items.useWhen: Ambient looping backgrounds, art/creative portfolio hero sections, waiting screens where gentle accumulation creates visual interest.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible content overlays — dots will obscure the room and any underlying text over time.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette by replacing the cols array with blues and greens: cols=['#0077ff','#00c896','#7c3aed','#06b6d4','#22c55e','#0a0608'], and slow the spawn rate by changing autoTimer>120 to autoTimer>200.
editableAreas: max dot count (240 cap via stickers.shift())
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion static fallback (40 dots, single draw)
knownLimitations: Room never truly clears — dots accumulate until oldest shift off the array (FIFO), so coverage is perpetual not rhythmic reset
No pointer interaction despite dots spawning randomly — not interactive

items.title: The Golden Tree
items.description: Recursive gold fractal tree grows and breathes via a pulsing sine wave, with spiral coil tips and drifting gold flecks against a near-black background.
items.useWhen: Luxury or art-themed hero backgrounds, gallery/museum digital installations, ambient dark-mode displays.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark canvas fill). Contexts where constant tree-growth motion competes with foreground content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the branch color from gold (#c8a951) to copper (#b87333), slow the breathing cycle by setting the sin multiplier from 0.45 to 0.2, and increase fleck count from 7 to 14.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fill — must change in two places
Recursive branch() has no explicit depth guard beyond the depth<=0 check; very large canvases may increase call depth slightly

items.title: Mosaic Shimmer
items.description: A 14x10 grid of gold tesserae pulses in diagonal sine-wave shimmer; sparse jewel-toned accents pop against the gold, evoking Byzantine mosaic.
items.useWhen: Luxury or art-themed hero backgrounds, Klimt/Art Nouveau design contexts, ambient looping screensavers with a gold palette.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark body). Contexts requiring legible text overlays — the constant tile scaling competes with content.

Scale transform on individual DOM cells may cause jank at large grid sizes on low-end devices

items.title: Spiral Ornament Engine
items.description: Gold spirals, all-seeing eyes, and gilded triangles fade in and out against a near-black background, slowly rotating as they drift through their lifespan.
items.useWhen: Dark-themed hero sections, art nouveau / decorative splash screens, ambient loading backgrounds with a luxury feel.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark canvas). Content-heavy layouts where continuous ornament motion competes with legibility.

knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#070502) — must edit both CSS and canvas fillRect to change
No pointer interactivity — purely generative; cannot react to cursor
Element count capped at 26 via shift(); increasing cap without tuning spawn rate raises density quickly

items.title: Gilded Halo
items.description: Concentric gold rings bloom and fade from click/pointer points while gold-leaf flecks scatter with gravity; auto-strikes keep it alive passively.
items.useWhen: Dark luxury hero backgrounds, art-inspired installations, Klimt/Art Nouveau themed UIs needing ambient gold motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark fill). Contexts needing legible content overlaid — rings and flecks compete visually.

pointermove strikes at 5% probability; heavy cursor movement can spike particle count
No aria live region for dynamic events — purely decorative role=img

items.title: The Pattern Loom
items.description: Three gold friezes of Klimt symbols (circles, spirals, triangles, eyes) scroll in alternating directions at staggered speeds, endlessly re-weaving.

items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark background). Contexts needing legible text overlays or minimal visual noise.

Symbol kind cycling uses time-based index, so pattern is not strictly periodic

items.title: Falling Gold
items.description: Diamond-shaped gold flakes drift and sway downward against a near-black background, each shimmering in opacity as they tumble and rotate.

No pointer interactivity; entirely passive
Flake count capped at 110 regardless of screen size

items.title: Byzantine Counterpoint

items.title: The Gilded Frame

items.title: The Great Wave off Kanagawa

items.title: Sudden Shower on the Great Bridge

items.title: Carp in the Still Pond
items.description: 5 koi fish swim lazy circles in deep indigo water; periodic ripple rings bloom outward and cause nearby fish to dart away. Ukiyo-e palette.
items.useWhen: Ambient backgrounds for art, nature, or Japanese-themed UIs. Loading screens or screensaver-style displays.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (canvas hardcoded to dark navy). Contexts where constant motion competes with text legibility.
items.agentPrompt: Change fish count to 8 by adding 3 more entries in seedKoi, increase max ripple radius to 120, and shift fish palette to cooler blues (#6a9fd9, #aecbe4).
editableAreas: fish count (loop limit i<5 in seedKoi)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillStyle — must update both to change from dark navy
No click/pointer interactivity — ripples are autonomous only
Fish wrap at canvas edges which can look abrupt on wide viewports

items.title: Thirty-Six Views of Fuji
items.description: Three Hokusai SVG scenes — morning Fuji, stormy lightning, great wave — auto cross-fade every 5s with per-scene live animation.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero backgrounds, Japanese aesthetic UIs, ambient gallery displays cycling historical scenes.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring text legibility over the background; low-end devices running many concurrent SVG animations.
items.agentPrompt: Change scene dwell time from 5 to 8 seconds by editing `switchAt = t + 5` to `switchAt = t + 8`, and add a fourth scene builder into the `builders` array.
knownLimitations: Lightning flicker is sine-wave driven — not truly random; can feel repetitive on long loops
Rain positions fixed at load time — reposition requires scene rebuild
SVG inline style transitions require modern browser (all fine in practice)

items.title: Sudden Rain
items.description: Up to 140 slanted rain streaks fall in two depth layers over a painted ukiyo-e scene: gradient sky, green hill, indigo river, and arched bridge silhouette.
items.useWhen: Ambient hero backgrounds with a Japanese art or painterly aesthetic. Loading screens or mood-setting interstices for cultural or travel content.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring legible text overlays — the constant rain motion competes with reading. Light-mode UIs where the muted palette feels out of place.
items.agentPrompt: Increase rain density by changing N to 220, steepen the slant by setting SLANT to -0.45, and shift the sky gradient to a stormy grey by changing PAL.sky to '#5a6a7a'.
knownLimitations: Background scene redrawn every frame (no offscreen cache) — minor CPU cost on large screens
Rain color hardcoded as rgba literals, not tied to PAL object

items.title: Bokashi Sky
items.description: Canvas sky cycles dawn→day→dusk→night with bokashi gradients; sun/moon arcs overhead, stars appear at night, a bird drifts across, hills anchor the base.
items.useWhen: Ambient backgrounds for art or nature-themed pages. Hero sections needing a slow, meditative day-cycle scene.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible text overlays — shifting sky colors reduce contrast unpredictably. Low-end devices that can't sustain a rAF loop.
items.agentPrompt: Slow the full day cycle to 36 seconds by changing PERIOD from 18 to 36, and add a second bird with offset phase (bu=(t*0.04+0.5)%1).
knownLimitations: Stars use fixed pseudo-random positions — no true scatter on resize
Background CSS color (#2a3550) must be updated manually if sky palette changes

items.title: Falling Snow
items.description: Snow flakes drift and sway over a ukiyo-e night scene: indigo sky, snow-capped rooftops, and a lone layered pine. Static fallback for reduced-motion.
items.useWhen: Seasonal or cultural hero backgrounds, winter themes, Japanese art-inspired decorative panels.
items.avoidWhen: Light-mode UIs (background hardcoded dark navy). Layouts requiring legible text over the canvas.
items.agentPrompt: Increase snowflake count by changing N cap from 120 to 200 and the density multiplier from 0.22 to 0.35, then shift the sky palette to a deeper midnight blue by setting PAL.indigo to '#0d2240'.
editableAreas: scene layout ratios (W/H multipliers for roofs and pine)
knownLimitations: Scene redraws every frame — no dirty-rect optimisation; heavy on very low-end devices at large viewport
Background hardcoded dark navy in CSS; must edit both CSS and PAL.ink to change

items.title: Distant Mountain
items.description: Four ukiyo-e hill silhouettes drift at different parallax rates past a snow-capped peak and glowing sun on a gradient indigo sky.
items.useWhen: Dark ambient backgrounds, art/culture sites, screensaver-style displays needing calm layered landscape motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (sky color hardcoded in CSS). Contexts needing foreground text legibility over the canvas.
items.agentPrompt: Change the sun position to center stage by setting sx to W*0.5, shift the peak layer color to a warmer rose-indigo, and slow drift speed from 0.18 to 0.08.
knownLimitations: Background CSS color (#3f6f9f) must be updated manually to match sky gradient changes
Parallax offsets use sin(drift) so motion is oscillating, not continuous scroll

items.title: Plum Branch
items.description: A Hiroshige-style ume plum branch with 11 blossoms that bloom open petal-by-petal, sway gently, and re-bloom every 12 seconds against layered ink hills.
items.useWhen: Cultural or nature-themed hero sections, ambient art backgrounds, Japanese aesthetic UI themes.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring text legibility over the canvas — the dark ink branch dominates the foreground. Not suited for light-only brand palettes.
items.agentPrompt: Change petal color to pale pink (#f7c5d8), increase blossom count by adding entries to the tips array, and slow the sway cycle to 12 seconds.
preserveElements: SVG ARIA role and aria-label on stage div
knownLimitations: Re-bloom uses animation:none + offsetWidth reflow trick — may flash briefly on very slow devices
Branch geometry is hardcoded SVG paths; reshaping requires manual coordinate editing

items.title: Boat on the Swell
items.description: A small ferry rocks on sine-wave swells at dusk beneath a sienna sun and three circling gulls, rendered in Hiroshige woodblock palette.
items.useWhen: Ambient hero backgrounds, cultural or travel themes, dark-mode landing pages needing calm painterly motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background is hardcoded dark navy). Contexts where subtle motion competes with text legibility.
items.agentPrompt: Move the sun to the right side by changing sx to W*0.70, shift sunset palette by replacing PAL.sienna with '#7a3b6a' for a violet dusk.
editableAreas: swell amplitude and count (amp, b loop 0..3)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#243044) — must edit both CSS and canvas gradient to change sky
Boat tilt derived from two swell sample points; at very wide viewports the angle change may be imperceptible

items.title: Lantern Path
items.description: 7 paper lanterns line a receding road in Hiroshige woodblock style; sky and lanterns cycle through dusk and dawn as darkness falls and lifts.
items.useWhen: Ambient hero backgrounds with a Japanese aesthetic, night-cycle themes, or decorative sections evoking traditional art.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible text overlay — the slowly shifting dark sky reduces contrast. Not suitable for light-mode UIs.
items.agentPrompt: Change lantern count to 9 by setting N=9, increase the cycle speed by changing PERIOD from 16 to 10, and shift the lit glow to a cool blue-white (replace #ffd98a with #c8e0ff and #e8943a with #7ab2d4).
editableAreas: lantern size range (34-22 px via w calculation)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded dark navy — cannot easily adapt to light themes
No user interactivity; purely ambient
Lanterns built with CSS border-radius ovals — not pixel-exact to brush-stroke originals

items.title: One Hundred Views
items.description: Four Hiroshige views cycle slowly — torii and pine recompose against bokashi skies with rain, snow, mist, or moonlight weather effects.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, Japanese art or travel themes, ambient looping screensavers needing a painterly aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (sky hardcoded dark); contexts needing more than 4 distinct scene states without code changes.
items.agentPrompt: Add a fifth view to VIEWS: {top:'#4a2040', bot:'#e87060', weather:'mist', moonX:0.50, moonY:0.18, label:'autumn dusk'}, and increase DUR to 11 for a slower cycle.
editableAreas: VIEWS array (sky colors, weather type, moon position, label)
DUR constant (cycle duration in seconds, default 9)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to dark navy — must edit CSS to change
Weather particle system reuses the same 120 particles across all weather types so density is fixed
Cross-fade only blends the last 22% of each scene — abrupt if DUR is very short

items.title: Pointillist Reveal
items.description: Colored dots scatter then assemble into a pointillist seashore — sail and parasol silhouettes — hold, dissolve, and repeat in an 11s loop.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero sections, museum/gallery contexts, ambient loading screens with a painterly aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Interfaces requiring legible text overlays or low-end devices sensitive to per-frame canvas redraws.
items.agentPrompt: Change dot count by editing Math.min(900,...) to 1400, and shift sky color from RGB.sky=[143,184,214] to a warm dusk tone like [214,160,100].
editableAreas: color palette (RGB object: green, sky, orange, violet, cream, ink)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change in two places
Dot density scales with viewport area; large screens may hit the 900-dot cap and look sparse

items.title: Optical Mixing
items.description: A hex grid of orange and sky-blue dots slowly fuse toward their averaged hue and separate again, demonstrating divisionist optical mixing on cream background.
items.useWhen: Art/design hero backgrounds, educational demos of color theory, ambient loops for museums or galleries.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring high contrast or legible text overlays — the cream background and soft palette are fixed and low-contrast.
items.agentPrompt: Change the two dot colors to red (#e03a3a) and green (#4caf50) by updating RGB.sky and RGB.orange, then slow the fuse cycle to t*0.25.
knownLimitations: Background and dot colors are hardcoded — changing theme requires editing both CSS and JS constants
No pointer interactivity; purely passive

items.title: Stipple Painter
items.description: An invisible brush drifts a Lissajous path, laying colored dots on a warm cream canvas in a slow pointillist build-up inspired by Seurat.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero backgrounds, ambient loading screens, or decorative panels where slow generative painting suits the mood.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing fast visual feedback or text readability over the canvas — dot accumulation fades slowly and background is hardcoded cream.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette by replacing RGB.sky to [100,180,255] and slow the brush path by reducing ap+=0.018 to ap+=0.008.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and clearAll() — must update both to change ground color
No pointer interactivity; purely autonomous

items.title: Dot Density Gradient
items.description: Stippled dots encode luminance via density; a sine-driven light band sweeps the field, shifting hues between orange, green, and violet zones.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero backgrounds, gallery intros, ambient screen fills where a painterly slow-motion texture is wanted.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — the moving light sweep and dense dot field compete with copy placed on top.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to cool blues: set RGB.green to [70,130,200], RGB.orange to [200,220,255], RGB.violet to [40,60,140], and slow the sweep by changing t*0.45 to t*0.2.
knownLimitations: Full canvas redraw every frame — moderately CPU-bound on large viewports due to nested dot loops
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change in two places

items.title: Afternoon Light
items.description: A diagonal light band sweeps a pointillist dot grid; dots shift from violet/sky-blue to orange/green as sunlight passes, then settle back.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, art-themed or museum contexts, ambient loops needing a calm color-shift effect.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark navy). Contexts where subtle motion is insufficient.
items.agentPrompt: Change warm colors to gold and coral by setting RGB.orange=[230,160,60] and RGB.green=[210,100,80], then widen the light band with bw=W*0.45.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must change #1a1f27 for light themes
Sweep direction is fixed diagonal; not configurable without code changes

items.title: Complementary Shimmer
items.description: Grid of orange-blue and green-violet dot pairs trembles out of phase, creating optical shimmer through simultaneous contrast. Motion lives in the eye.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero backgrounds, gallery interfaces, ambient decorative panels where optical vibrancy is desired without heavy motion.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible text overlays — the flickering dot grid competes with reading. Avoid on low-end devices where steady rAF loops are a concern.
items.agentPrompt: Change to red-cyan pairs by replacing RGB.orange with [210,60,50] and RGB.sky with [60,190,200], then slow shimmer by setting sp range to 1.2+Math.random()*1.0.
editableAreas: color palette (RGB object: green, sky, orange, violet)
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (REDUCED — disables motion, draws static frame)
knownLimitations: Grid density capped at 14 cols/rows — coarser spacing on very large viewports
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change both to retheme

items.title: The Parasol
items.description: A parasol silhouette of colored dots slowly spins; dome segments cycle through Seurat's orange, violet, green, and sky-blue palette.
items.useWhen: Ambient art-theme backgrounds, museum or gallery digital signage, decorative hero sections with a painterly aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing user interaction or clear text overlays — the spin and dot texture compete with legible content.
items.agentPrompt: Change spin speed from 0.35 to 0.7 in draw() (t*0.35), swap RGB.orange to [200,80,80] for a red segment, increase dome dot radius r from 1.9 to 2.5.
editableAreas: dot radius per type (r=1.9 dome, r=1.6 stick)
knownLimitations: Reduced-motion shows a fixed frame at spin=0.25 — parasol orientation is hardcoded for that state
Background color is hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change in two places

items.title: Pointillist Frame
items.description: Canvas field of color-cycling dots with a breathing dot border; gradient drifts through green, sky, orange, and violet in Seurat pointillist style.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero backgrounds, museum or gallery UIs, ambient screensavers needing a painterly aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring text overlays — dot field competes visually. Low-contrast palettes clash with the fixed warm-cream background.
items.agentPrompt: Change gradient palette by replacing RGB.sky with [90,160,220] and RGB.violet with [180,80,160], then increase gap from 13 to 18 for a sparser dot grid.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded as #f1ecdf in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change both to retheme
Dot count scales with viewport; large screens may stress fill calls on low-end devices

items.title: The Halo
items.description: Three nested SVG rings of gilded beads and teardrops rotate on slow opposing axes around a breathing gold rosette, evoking Mucha's decorative halos.
items.useWhen: Art-nouveau themed hero sections, cultural/museum contexts, ambient decorative backgrounds needing elegant slow motion.
items.avoidWhen: Dark backgrounds (palette hardcoded for warm cream). Contexts needing interactivity or content overlaid in the center.
items.agentPrompt: Change PAL.gold to '#d4af37' for brighter gilt, slow the outer ring to 80s duration, increase bead count on outer ring from 24 to 32.
preserveElements: REDUCED motion guard on all animations
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded to warm cream (#f4ecd8) — must edit CSS to change
CSS animations run continuously even when tab is hidden (no visibility pause)

items.title: Whiplash Vines
items.description: Sinuous sage and teal tendrils grow and curl on parchment; each vine ends in a rose or gold bezier-petal bloom, fades, and the cycle restarts.
items.useWhen: Art Nouveau hero backgrounds, editorial pages, or decorative ambient loops where organic growth motion fits the brand.
items.avoidWhen: Content-heavy layouts where moving vines compete with text, or low-end devices where continuous canvas redraws are costly.
items.agentPrompt: Change vine palette to burgundy and forest green by setting PAL.sage to '#6b2d3e' and PAL.teal to '#2d5a27', and raise the vine cap from 5 to 7.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change both to recolor
No pointer interactivity — vines spawn on a timer only

items.title: Border Weaver
items.description: Mirrored Art Nouveau bands draw themselves stroke by stroke — gold sine scrolls, sage waves, rose petals, and teal beads trace across parchment then reset.
items.useWhen: Decorative loading screens, Art Nouveau / botanical themed headers, ornamental framing for editorial layouts.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays in band zones; layouts where the hardcoded parchment background conflicts with the page color.
items.agentPrompt: Change the reveal cycle from 6 seconds to 10 by setting `const cycle=10`, then swap the gold scroll color to terracotta by changing `PAL.gold` to `'#b5522a'`.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillRect — must change in two places
Purely passive — no touch or pointer interactivity
Petal orientation uses a fixed rotate offset; looks asymmetric on very narrow viewports

items.title: Floral Mandala
items.description: 12 mirrored sectors of sage stems, leaves, and gold-cored petaled flowers breathe and slowly rotate around a central rosette on a dark warm ground.
items.useWhen: Dark decorative backgrounds, art-nouveau or botanical themes, ambient looping hero sections.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark CSS), content-heavy layouts where radial motion competes with text.
items.agentPrompt: Change sector count from 12 to 8 by setting SECT=8, swap PAL.sage to '#7a6a9b' for a violet palette, and slow rotation by changing t*0.15 to t*0.07.
knownLimitations: Background color is hardcoded in both CSS and canvas gradient — must change both to retheme
No pointer interactivity — purely passive

items.title: The Four Seasons Arc
items.description: Rotating floral halo cross-fades through four seasonal colourways — spring sage, summer rose, autumn gold, winter teal — each with distinct petal count.
items.useWhen: Decorative ambient display, seasonal landing pages, art-nouveau themed hero sections needing slow looping color transitions.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays at center — the rotating bloom occupies the focal point. Reduced-motion users see only a static frame.
items.agentPrompt: Change Spring petal count from 5 to 8, set the Spring accent color to '#e84393', and slow the season hold time from 2.8 to 5 seconds.
editableAreas: SEASONS array (colourway, petal count per season)
knownLimitations: Reduced-motion users see only a single static frame — no season cycling
Season label uses Marcellus/Georgia fallback; no Google Font loaded so display depends on system fonts

items.title: Stained Ribbon
items.description: Three layered ribbons in teal, sage, and peach undulate across a dark ground in a stacked sine-wave motion, edged in gold with glinting enamel bead accents.
items.useWhen: Art Nouveau hero sections, decorative banners, ambient background overlays in dark-theme UIs.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (dark ground is hardcoded). Contexts needing text legibility across the ribbon band.
items.agentPrompt: Change ribbon colors to dusty rose, lavender, and ochre by updating PAL.tealDeep, PAL.sage, and PAL.peach, then slow the wave by reducing t*1.2 to t*0.7.
knownLimitations: Background color is hardcoded dark brown — must edit CSS and paintBg() to change
No pointer interactivity — purely passive
Step size of 6px in path loop may show slight faceting at very large viewport widths

items.title: Mosaic Tendrils
items.description: Colored beads bloom and connect with gradient lines, branching into tendrils that slowly replace oldest nodes. Mucha palette: gold, sage, rose, peach, teal.
items.useWhen: Art-nouveau or decorative hero backgrounds, ambient loading screens, botanical or filigree-themed brand presentations.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — growing dot network competes visually. Not suitable where motion must stop on demand.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to cooler tones by replacing PAL.sage with '#6b8fa3' and PAL.rose with '#a07db0', and slow growth by changing the interval threshold from 0.34 to 0.55.
knownLimitations: Growth is purely random — no directional bias, so tendrils can cluster in one area
Resize re-seeds entirely, losing current growth state
Many nodes create many DOM elements — may slow on low-end devices at high MAX

items.title: The Decorative Panel
items.description: Arched Mucha panel on canvas: gold frame breathes open, rotating petal rings and a rayed halo glow at center, garland of flowers sways along the base.
items.useWhen: Art nouveau hero backgrounds, luxury brand contexts, museum or gallery interfaces needing ornate ambient motion.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (hardcoded dark brown). Contexts needing legible text overlays — centered composition fills the viewport.
items.agentPrompt: Change PAL.peach to '#a0c4ff', PAL.rose to '#b197fc', PAL.gold to '#e0aaff', and slow breathing by changing t*0.5 to t*0.25.
editableAreas: color palette (PAL object — cream, sage, peach, gold, rose)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS and canvas gradient — must change both to recolor
Panel frame width clamps at 520px so very wide viewports show empty side margins

items.title: The Rebalancing Grid
items.description: Mondrian grid of black lines slides to new layouts while red, blue, and yellow cells fade in, resolving into a balanced composition every few seconds.
items.useWhen: Art/design hero backgrounds, generative-art showcases, or any landing that needs structured ambient motion.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — the shifting bold grid competes with copy. Light background requires CSS override.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to cool tones: set C.red to '#e040fb', C.blue to '#00bcd4', C.yellow to '#76ff03', and slow transitions by increasing dur to 4000.
editableAreas: primary colors (C.red, C.blue, C.yellow, C.white, C.black)
grid line counts (3 vertical, 2 horizontal base)
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (REDUCED flag + static draw path)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and C.white — must change both together
Fill cell distribution is random per cycle, color balance varies unpredictably

items.title: Broadway Boogie Woogie
items.description: Colored squares pulse along yellow grid avenues like NYC traffic; intersection dots blink in red, blue, and yellow referencing Mondrian's 1943 painting.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero backgrounds, Mondrian/De Stijl style pages, ambient generative art displays.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible text overlays — the animated grid creates visual noise. Background color is hardcoded off-white.
items.agentPrompt: Change grid spacing from gap=30 to gap=40, increase band width from band=11 to band=16, and swap yellow road color to white for a classic black-grid look.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS (#f7f4ec) — must edit both CSS and C.white constant to change
Runner/blink layout re-randomizes on each resize

items.title: Self-Assembling Composition
items.description: Mondrian grid builds itself every 4 s: cells scale in staggered, black lines draw outward, primary colors fill random regions, then recomposes anew.
items.useWhen: Art/design hero backgrounds, generative art showcases, or any ambient abstract motion context with a geometric aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing a stable background — the full canvas clears and redraws every few seconds, which is disruptive behind content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the recompose interval to 6000ms (replace 4200 in setTimeout), reduce colored cell count by changing the colorCount floor from 3 to 2, and swap C.red to '#e85d04' for a burnt-orange palette.
preserveElements: double-rAF flush for CSS transition trigger
knownLimitations: Canvas clears entirely on each recompose — no smooth morph between states
Line rendering uses absolute-positioned divs; very narrow cells can produce overlapping lines
No aria live region — screen readers only get the static aria-label

items.title: Trading Weight
items.description: Red and blue blocks trade mass across a fixed axis; a yellow counterweight keeps the Mondrian grid balanced. Slow eased transitions reseed randomly.
items.useWhen: Art/design-themed hero backgrounds, generative aesthetic loops, Mondrian or De Stijl brand contexts.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing text legibility over canvas or user interaction — tile is fully passive.
items.agentPrompt: Set axisX=0.5 to center the axis, change dur=3600 to slow transitions, swap C.red to '#f6c700' and C.blue to '#1a6e3c'.
knownLimitations: Background color set in both CSS and canvas fill — must change both to recolor the field
No touch/pointer interactivity; fully autonomous

items.title: Self-Painting Cells
items.description: A fixed asymmetric Mondrian grid whose cells autonomously cycle through red, blue, and yellow with smooth CSS transitions, like an unattended painter at work.
items.useWhen: Art-inspired hero backgrounds, creative portfolio pieces, ambient loop displays with bold primary color palettes.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — bold color shifts compete with content. Low-stimulation environments where color change would distract.
items.agentPrompt: Change the beat interval from 650ms to 1200ms for a slower pace, and add green (#2e7d32) as a fourth color in the CYCLE array.
editableAreas: color palette (C object: red, blue, yellow)
preserveElements: drawLines() called after cells (keeps lines on top)
knownLimitations: Grid proportions are hardcoded in V and Hh arrays — not responsive to viewport ratio
Random cell selection means composition balance is probabilistic, not guaranteed

items.title: Victory Boogie Marquee
items.description: A 9x9 Mondrian grid rotated 45° as a diamond; red, blue, and yellow squares ripple diagonally in a boogie-woogie march via time-stepped index.
items.useWhen: Art-themed hero backgrounds, Mondrian/De Stijl creative projects, ambient looping displays needing bold primary color motion.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing legible text overlays or minimalist UIs — the rotating diamond and marching colors dominate the viewport.
items.agentPrompt: Change N from 9 to 12 for a finer grid, slow the march by setting the dt multiplier from 0.0025 to 0.001, and swap C.white background for C.yellow.
knownLimitations: Color distribution uses modular arithmetic — changing N alters colored-cell density unpredictably
No pointer interactivity; purely ambient

items.title: Equilibrium Engine
items.description: Mondrian grid with spring-driven lines; primary color blocks recolor every 2s; a center-of-mass dot tracks the weighted area of colored cells.
items.useWhen: Ambient backgrounds or art-themed hero sections needing calm geometric motion. Museum, gallery, or design portfolio contexts.
items.avoidWhen: Dark-background layouts — background is hardcoded cream. Contexts where constant grid rebalancing distracts from foreground content.
items.agentPrompt: Change line thickness from 7 to 10 (TH constant), add a 4th vertical spring with spring(.6), and shift yellow accent to #FFD700.
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (REDUCED flag + static draw loop)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and C.white — must change both to retheme
Block recoloring is instant (no interpolation), causing sudden color switches on rebalance

items.title: De Stijl Marquee
items.description: Two horizontal tracks of De Stijl manifesto words scroll in opposite directions inside colored primary-palette blocks framed by bold black borders.
items.useWhen: Art/design-themed hero backgrounds, cultural or editorial layouts, typographic ambient displays referencing modernist aesthetics.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible static text or user interaction — the constant scroll competes with readable content.
items.agentPrompt: Change the WORDS array to brand slogans, set C.red to '#FF4500', and increase scroll speed by changing sp from 0.05 to 0.09.
knownLimitations: Block widths are random at paint time — layout differs on every load
Requires Archivo Black from system fallback; no Google Fonts import so weight may not render as intended on all devices

items.title: The Black Square, Breathing
items.description: A near-black square barely scales and rotates on a warm white ground; a faint red ghost square offsets behind it. Suprematist stillness in motion.
items.useWhen: Art/culture hero backgrounds, minimal ambient displays, gallery digital signage where extreme restraint is needed.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing obvious motion or engagement cues — the animation is near-imperceptible and will read as static to many users.
items.agentPrompt: Slow the breathing cycle to 12 seconds by changing the animation duration in `#mal01-stage.run #mal01-sq { animation: mal01-breathe 12s ... }`, and increase ghost opacity from 0.10 to 0.20.
knownLimitations: Animation is extremely subtle — scale 1.045 and 1.1deg rotation may be invisible on small or low-DPI screens
Background and square colors are hardcoded — must edit CSS to retheme

items.title: Suprematist Drift
items.description: 9 colored bars in black, red, blue, yellow rotate at random angles and drift slowly across a cream field via alternating CSS keyframes.
items.useWhen: Art/design-themed hero backgrounds, gallery splash screens, ambient displays referencing early modernist aesthetics.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — bars drift into readable areas. Dark-background layouts where the cream field clashes.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to earthy tones by updating PAL to {black:'#2b1d0e', red:'#8b3a1a', blue:'#2c4a6e', yellow:'#c9913d'} and increase bar count N from 9 to 14.
knownLimitations: Bar positions randomize on each page load — composition cannot be pinned
Bars can overlap in ways that obscure each other; no z-index ordering logic

items.title: Dynamic Composition
items.description: Suprematist shapes fly in from edges, hold in a white void, then depart — bars, circles, crosses in black, red, blue, yellow; never repeating.
items.useWhen: Art/design hero backgrounds, gallery intros, ambient looping displays with a Bauhaus or modernist aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing user focus or legible text overlays — constant shape movement competes with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Change PAL.red to '#e05a00' and PAL.blue to '#0077cc', reduce max element count from 14 to 8, and slow spawn interval from 1100ms to 1800ms.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillStyle — must update both to change
No touch/pointer interactivity by design; purely generative

items.title: The Aviator's Field
items.description: Suprematist bars in black, red, blue, and yellow launch diagonally across an off-white field at steady tempo; reduced-motion shows a static arrangement.
items.useWhen: Art/design hero sections, Suprematist or Bauhaus-themed UIs, ambient background for creative portfolios.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays or low-end devices where constant 60fps canvas redraws may strain CPU.
items.agentPrompt: Slow the launch tempo from 0.62 to 1.2 seconds by changing the tempo constant, and shift the palette to warm earth tones by editing the PAL object colors.
knownLimitations: Bar end-cap square is axis-aligned, not rotated with the bar — minor visual artifact at steep angles
40-bar hard cap silently drops excess bars on rapid launch

items.title: Cross & Circle
items.description: Suprematist shapes — cross, circle, bar, square — fling in from the nearest edge with cubic ease and a settling wobble, auto-composing on a warm white field.
items.useWhen: Art/design portfolio hero, generative canvas demos, Malevich/Bauhaus-themed UI backgrounds.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays or a light interactive palette — background color is hardcoded warm cream and shapes accumulate up to 9 on screen.
items.agentPrompt: Change the palette to include white and add green: set PAL to {black:'#111111', red:'#d8261c', green:'#1a7a3c', white:'#f0ece2'} and update cols array accordingly.
editableAreas: color palette (PAL object and cols array)
preserveElements: prefers-reduced-motion guard (REDUCED branch with static frames)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillStyle — must change in two places
Up to 9 shapes accumulate; oldest is dropped via shift(), not a clean fade-out
Click target is the whole stage div, not individual shapes — no per-shape interaction

items.title: Weightless
items.description: 7 Suprematist shapes — squares, circles, bars, crosses in red/blue/yellow/white — orbit and self-spin around an invisible centre on a dark field.
items.useWhen: Art/gallery hero backgrounds, ambient screensavers, dark-mode sections needing calm geometric motion with a fine-art reference.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (dark canvas hardcoded). Contexts needing legible text overlays — orbiting shapes compete with reading.
items.agentPrompt: Add an 8th body with kind='bar', color PAL.white, R=0.55, and selfSpin=1.2 for a fast-spinning outer ring element.
knownLimitations: Background hardcoded to #111111 in both CSS and canvas fillRect — change both
No pointer interactivity
Orbit paths are fixed ellipses — no physics

items.title: Red Wedge
items.description: A bold red CSS triangle slowly sweeps across a cream field past faint black and grey rectangles, evoking Malevich's Suprematist diagonal.
items.useWhen: Art/design portfolio heroes, constructivist or avant-garde themes, ambient background loops that reference Suprematist aesthetics.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays (wedge sweeps over the layout). Audiences sensitive to slow diagonal motion.
items.agentPrompt: Change the wedge color from #d8261c to #0033cc (blue wedge variant), slow the cycle to 14s, and increase the wedge tip height from 130px to 180px.
knownLimitations: Background blocks use Math.random() — layout shifts on every page load
Wedge is pure CSS border trick; resizing viewport may distort proportions at extreme aspect ratios

items.title: White on White
items.description: 8 white Suprematist shapes drift silently on warm white, each casting a faint baked drop shadow. Near-invisible, meditative motion.
items.useWhen: Art/gallery heroes, minimal ambient backgrounds, whitespace-driven designs where extreme restraint is the aesthetic.
items.avoidWhen: Dark backgrounds (palette hardcoded warm white). Layouts needing legible text overlay — shapes offer no contrast.
items.agentPrompt: Change tone range to cool grey (tone: 235) and increase form count to 12 by changing i<8 to i<12 in the forms loop.
preserveElements: offscreen sprite baking (prevents per-frame shadowBlur cost)
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and canvas fillStyle — must change both to retheme
Shape placement is random on each load — not deterministic
No pointer interactivity

items.title: The Wallpaper Loom
items.description: A seamless William Morris botanical tile — olive stems, sage leaves, a madder flower, and indigo berry clusters — scrolls diagonally on a warm cream ground.
items.useWhen: Arts-and-crafts or heritage brand backgrounds, decorative hero sections, nature or textile themed UIs.
items.avoidWhen: Layouts requiring legible text overlays — the scrolling pattern competes with foreground content. Light minimal design systems.
items.agentPrompt: Change patSize to 180 for a larger repeat tile, swap PAL.madder to '#8b5e3c' for an earthy rust flower, and slow scroll speed from dt*10 to dt*5.
editableAreas: leaf scale values (sc param in leaf calls)
knownLimitations: Tile is procedurally drawn at a fixed 132px grid — resize requires rebuilding via buildTile(), not just scaling
Diagonal scroll direction is hardcoded (translate -off, +off); changing direction needs both axes adjusted

items.title: Bird & Berry Repeat
items.description: A tiled canvas repeating stylized birds and berry sprigs in William Morris palette; the colourway breathes slowly across three indigo-madder-olive schemes.
items.useWhen: Decorative hero backgrounds, arts-and-crafts themed UIs, ambient wallpaper sections with a historic or botanical mood.
items.avoidWhen: Light or bright-color UIs (ground color is hardcoded warm parchment). Contexts needing legible text overlays — pattern density competes with copy.
items.agentPrompt: Change the colourway cycle to hold on indigo only by setting ways to a single entry, and increase cell size from 92 to 120 for larger motifs.
knownLimitations: Background parchment colour hardcoded in CSS and in ways[].ground — must update both to change it
No pointer interactivity — purely ambient

items.title: Growing Vine
items.description: Recursive vine grows upward from bottom center, branching symmetrically with olive leaves and madder flowers at tips, then fades and regrows on deep indigo.
items.useWhen: William Morris or Arts and Crafts themed displays, botanical ambient backgrounds, decorative hero sections with an organic feel.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts needing text overlays (vine fills the canvas). Low-end devices running many simultaneous tiles.
items.agentPrompt: Change the vine palette to warm terracotta by setting PAL.sage to '#b07050', PAL.olive to '#8b6540', and slow growth by changing dt*0.28 to dt*0.14.
knownLimitations: Recursive vine redraws every frame — depth 5 means up to 2^5 branch calls per draw, heavier than it looks
Background color hardcoded in both CSS and PAL.indigoDeep — update both to change it

items.title: The Colour-Way Switcher
items.description: Morris ogee botanical tile scrolls upward while cross-fading through five historic dye-bath colourways — indigo, madder, sage, gold, and ink.
items.useWhen: Heritage, craft, or textile-themed hero backgrounds. Ambient loops where slow, contemplative motion suits the brand.
items.avoidWhen: Contexts requiring legible text overlays — the repeating pattern competes visually with content.
items.agentPrompt: Change tileSize to 180, add a sixth colourway with stem:'#7b3f6e' (Victorian plum), and slow scroll speed from dt*6 to dt*3.
editableAreas: colourways array — edit or add palette objects
hold duration (2.6 s) — time on each colourway
knownLimitations: buildTile is called every frame — cache the tile canvas when blend===1 for better perf on low-end devices
Ground colour lives in the colourway object, not CSS — cannot be overridden by parent page styles alone

items.title: The Acanthus Scroll
items.description: Two rows of William Morris acanthus leaf motifs scroll continuously on a cream ground; a gold pen traces the path as if self-drawing.
items.useWhen: Arts-and-crafts themed headers, heritage brand backgrounds, ambient decorative borders needing a handcrafted feel.
items.avoidWhen: Light minimal UIs or contexts where continuous horizontal motion competes with reading. Avoid on low-power devices with large viewports.
items.agentPrompt: Change scroll speed from 26 to 14 by editing `scroll=(scroll+dt*26)`, swap PAL.olive to '#8b6914' for a golden-brown stem, and increase unit from 170 to 220 for wider spacing.
knownLimitations: Background color is hardcoded in CSS (#efe7d2) and PAL.cream must match
No touch/pointer interactivity — purely decorative
Pen tracer disabled when reduced-motion is on

items.title: The Trellis
items.description: Diamond lattice of olive laths with madder roses and leaves at each joint; blooms open in a staggered wave across the trellis then repeat every 6 seconds.
items.useWhen: William Morris or Arts & Crafts themed hero backgrounds, decorative loading screens, botanical/nature brand pages.
items.avoidWhen: Content-heavy layouts where repeating bloom motion competes with reading. Low-end devices with many DOM nodes from large viewports.
items.agentPrompt: Change rose color from madder red to dusty pink by editing the SVG circle fills (replace #a8392b with #c97b8a and #c2553f with #d9a0a0), and slow the wave cycle to 9000ms in the setInterval call.
editableAreas: rose SVG colors (fill values in roseSVG())
knownLimitations: DOM node count scales with viewport — very large screens may create hundreds of rose/leaf elements
Lath lines use fixed 45deg diagonal — does not adapt to non-square aspect ratios aesthetically

items.title: The Kaleido Tile
items.description: Eight-fold mirrored Morris botanical wedge — olive leaves, madder berries, sage stems — rotates slowly against deep indigo, forming a rose-window of pattern.
items.useWhen: Dark-mode hero backgrounds, arts-and-crafts or heritage brand themes, ambient screensaver-style displays.
items.avoidWhen: Light backgrounds (indigo hardcoded in CSS). Contexts needing text legibility over the canvas.
items.agentPrompt: Change rotation speed by editing `rot += dt * 0.16` to `rot += dt * 0.04` for a slower spin, and swap `PAL.madder` to `'#b05cc8'` for purple berries.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in both CSS and PAL.indigoDeep — must change both to retheme
No pointer interactivity; purely autonomous rotation
Static single frame under reduced-motion (no illustrated fallback)

items.title: The Honeycomb Repeat
items.description: Hexagonal grid where each cell blooms with olive leaves, madder petals, and an indigo berry; motifs pulse in traveling sine waves across the tiled field.
items.useWhen: Dark-background hero sections, decorative full-bleed backgrounds for craft/botanical/arts themes.
items.avoidWhen: Light-background layouts (background hardcoded dark indigo). Contexts needing text legibility over the pattern.
items.agentPrompt: Change the hex radius from R=44 to R=32 for a denser grid, swap PAL.madder to '#c0392b' for brighter petals, and slow the pulse wave by changing t*1.4 to t*0.8.
knownLimitations: Background color hardcoded in CSS — must change both #1d3550 in CSS and PAL.indigoDeep to retheme
No pointer interaction — purely ambient
Dense hex loop may be CPU-heavy at very large viewport sizes
